echo '==> й…ҚзҪ®еӣҪеҶ…й•ңеғҸжәҗHOMEBREW BOTTLE'

#еҲӨж–ӯдёӢз»Ҳз«ҜжҳҜBashиҝҳжҳҜzsh
case "$SHELL" in
  */bash*)
    if [[ -r "$HOME/.bash_profile" ]]; then
      shell_profile="${HOME}/.bash_profile"
    else
      shell_profile="${HOME}/.profile"
    fi
    ;;
  */zsh*)
    shell_profile="${HOME}/.zprofile"
    ;;
  *)
    shell_profile="${HOME}/.profile"
    ;;
esac

if [[ -f ${shell_profile} ]]; then
  AddPermission ${shell_profile}
fi
#еҲ йҷӨд№ӢеүҚзҡ„зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸ
if [[ -z "${HOMEBREW_ON_LINUX-}" ]]; then
  #Mac
  sed -i "" "/ckbrew/d" ${shell_profile}
else
  #Linux
  sed -i "/ckbrew/d" ${shell_profile}

#еҶҷе…ҘзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸеҲ°ж–Үд»¶

echo "
  export HOMEBREW_BOTTLE_DOMAIN=${USER_HOMEBREW_BOTTLE_DOMAIN} #ckbrew
  eval \$(${HOMEBREW_REPOSITORY}/bin/brew shellenv) #ckbrew
" >> ${shell_profile}

source "${shell_profile}"
if [ $? -ne 0 ];then
    echo "${tty_red}еҸ‘зҺ°й”ҷиҜҜпјҢ${shell_profile} ж–Үд»¶дёӯжңүй”ҷиҜҜпјҢе»әи®®ж №жҚ®дёҠдёҖеҸҘжҸҗзӨәдҝ®ж”№пјӣ
                еҗҰеҲҷдјҡеҜјиҮҙжҸҗзӨә permission denied: brew${tty_reset}"
fi

AddPermission ${HOMEBREW_REPOSITORY}

if [[ -n "${HOMEBREW_ON_LINUX-}" ]]; then
    #жЈҖжөӢlinux curlжҳҜеҗҰжңүе®үиЈ…
    echo "${tty_red}-жЈҖжөӢcurlжҳҜеҗҰе®үиЈ… з•ҷж„ҸжҳҜеҗҰйңҖиҰҒиҫ“е…ҘY${tty_reset}"
    curl -V
    if [ $? -ne 0 ];then
        sudo apt-get install curl
        if [ $? -ne 0 ];then
            sudo yum install curl
            if [ $? -ne 0 ];then
                echo 'еӨұиҙҘ иҜ·иҮӘиЎҢе®үиЈ…curl еҸҜд»ҘеҸӮиҖғhttps://www.howtoing.com/install-curl-in-linux'
                error_game_over
            fi
        fi
    fi
fi

echo '
==> е®үиЈ…е®ҢжҲҗпјҢbrewзүҲжң¬
'
brew -v
if [ $? -ne 0 ];then
    echo 'еҸ‘зҺ°й”ҷиҜҜпјҢиҮӘеҠЁдҝ®еӨҚдёҖж¬ЎпјҒ'
    rm -rf $HOMEBREW_CACHE
    export PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:${HOMEBREW_REPOSITORY}/bin
    brew update-reset
    brew -v
    if [ $? -ne 0 ];then
      error_game_over
    fi
else
    echo "${tty_green}BrewеүҚжңҹй…ҚзҪ®жҲҗеҠҹ${tty_reset}"
fi

#brew 3.1.2зүҲжң¬ дҝ®ж”№дәҶеҫҲеӨҡең°еқҖпјҢйғҪеҶҷжӯ»еңЁдәҶд»Јз ҒдёӯпјҢжІЎжңүи°ғз”ЁзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸгҖӮгҖӮйўқгҖӮгҖӮ
#rubyдёӢиҪҪйңҖиҰҒж”№е®ҳж–№ж–Үд»¶
ruby_URL_file=$HOMEBREW_REPOSITORY/Library/Homebrew/cmd/vendor-install.sh

#еҲӨж–ӯMacзі»з»ҹзүҲжң¬
if [[ -z "${HOMEBREW_ON_LINUX-}" ]]; then
  if version_gt "$macos_version" "10.14"; then
      echo "з”өи„‘зі»з»ҹзүҲжң¬пјҡ$macos_version"
  else
      echo "${tty_red}жЈҖжөӢеҲ°дҪ дёҚжҳҜжңҖж–°зі»з»ҹпјҢдјҡжңүдёҖдәӣжҠҘй”ҷпјҢиҜ·зЁҚзӯүRubyдёӢиҪҪе®үиЈ…;${tty_reset}
      "
  fi

  if [[ -f ${ruby_URL_file} ]]; then
      sed -i "" "s/ruby_URL=/ruby_URL=\"https:\/\/mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn\/homebrew-bottles\/bottles-portable-ruby\/\$ruby_FILENAME\" \#/g" $ruby_URL_file
  fi
else
  if [[ -f ${ruby_URL_file} ]]; then
      sed -i "s/ruby_URL=/ruby_URL=\"https:\/\/mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn\/linuxbrew-bottles\/bottles-portable-ruby\/\$ruby_FILENAME\" \#/g" $ruby_URL_file
  fi
fi

brew services cleanup

if [[ $GIT_SPEED == "" ]];then
  echo '
  ==> brew update-reset
  '
  brew update-reset
  if [[ $? -ne 0 ]];then
      brew config
      error_game_over
      exit 0
  fi
else
   #жһҒйҖҹжЁЎејҸжҸҗзӨәUpdateдҝ®еӨҚж–№жі•
    echo "
${tty_red}  жһҒйҖҹзүҲжң¬е®үиЈ…е®ҢжҲҗпјҢ${tty_reset} installеҠҹиғҪжӯЈеёёпјҢеҰӮжһңйңҖиҰҒupdateеҠҹиғҪиҜ·иҮӘиЎҢиҝҗиЎҢдёӢйқўдёүеҸҘе‘Ҫд»Ө
git -C ${HOMEBREW_REPOSITORY}/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core fetch --unshallow
git -C ${HOMEBREW_REPOSITORY}/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-cask fetch --unshallow
brew update-reset
  "
fi

echo "
        ${tty_green}BrewиҮӘеҠЁе®үиЈ…зЁӢеәҸиҝҗиЎҢе®ҢжҲҗ${tty_reset}
          ${tty_green}еӣҪеҶ…ең°еқҖе·Із»Ҹй…ҚзҪ®е®ҢжҲҗ${tty_reset}

  жЎҢйқўзҡ„Old_Homebrewж–Үд»¶еӨ№пјҢеӨ§иҮҙзңӢзңӢжІЎжңүдҪ йңҖиҰҒзҡ„еҸҜд»ҘеҲ йҷӨгҖӮ

              еҲқжӯҘд»Ӣз»ҚеҮ дёӘbrewе‘Ҫд»Ө
жң¬ең°иҪҜд»¶еә“еҲ—иЎЁпјҡbrew ls
жҹҘжүҫиҪҜд»¶пјҡbrew search googleпјҲе…¶дёӯgoogleжӣҝжҚўдёәиҰҒжҹҘжүҫзҡ„е…ій”®еӯ—пјү
жҹҘзңӢbrewзүҲжң¬пјҡbrew -v  жӣҙж–°brewзүҲжң¬пјҡbrew update
е®үиЈ…caskиҪҜд»¶пјҡbrew install --cask firefox жҠҠfirefoxжҚўжҲҗдҪ иҰҒе®үиЈ…зҡ„
        ${tty_green}
        ж¬ўиҝҺеҸій”®зӮ№еҮ»дёӢж–№ең°еқҖ-жү“ејҖURL жқҘз»ҷзӮ№дёӘиөһ${tty_reset}
        ${tty_underline} https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/111014448 ${tty_reset}
"

if [[ -z "${HOMEBREW_ON_LINUX-}" ]]; then
  #Mac
  echo "${tty_red} йҮҚеҗҜз»Ҳз«Ҝ жҲ–иҖ… иҝҗиЎҢ${tty_bold} source ${shell_profile}  ${tty_reset} ${tty_red}еҗҰеҲҷеҸҜиғҪж— жі•дҪҝз”Ё${tty_reset}
  "
else
  #Linux
  echo "${tty_red} LinuxйңҖиҰҒйҮҚеҗҜз”өи„‘ жҲ–иҖ…жҡӮж—¶иҝҗиЎҢ${tty_bold} source ${shell_profile} ${tty_reset} ${tty_red}еҗҰеҲҷеҸҜиғҪж— жі•дҪҝз”Ё${tty_reset}
  "
fi

item.title: Gorm
item.description:
е…іиҒ”е…ізі»

е…іиҒ”е…ізі»еҝ…йЎ»иҰҒжұӮеӨ–й”®

е…іиҒ”ж Үзӯҫ

ж Үзӯҫ жҸҸиҝ°
foreignKey жҢҮе®ҡеҪ“еүҚжЁЎеһӢзҡ„еҲ—дҪңдёәиҝһжҺҘиЎЁзҡ„еӨ–й”®
references жҢҮе®ҡеј•з”ЁиЎЁзҡ„еҲ—еҗҚпјҢе…¶е°Ҷиў«жҳ е°„дёәиҝһжҺҘиЎЁеӨ–й”®
polymorphic жҢҮе®ҡеӨҡжҖҒзұ»еһӢпјҢжҜ”еҰӮжЁЎеһӢеҗҚ
polymorphicValue жҢҮе®ҡеӨҡжҖҒеҖјгҖҒй»ҳи®ӨиЎЁеҗҚ
many2many жҢҮе®ҡиҝһжҺҘиЎЁиЎЁеҗҚ
joinForeignKey жҢҮе®ҡиҝһжҺҘиЎЁзҡ„еӨ–й”®еҲ—еҗҚпјҢе…¶е°Ҷиў«жҳ е°„еҲ°еҪ“еүҚиЎЁ
joinReferences жҢҮе®ҡиҝһжҺҘиЎЁзҡ„еӨ–й”®еҲ—еҗҚпјҢе…¶е°Ҷиў«жҳ е°„еҲ°еј•з”ЁиЎЁ
constraint е…ізі»зәҰжқҹпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡOnUpdateгҖҒOnDelete

ж— е…іиҒ”

CRUD

	DB.Where("id > ?", 2).Select("id", "name").Order("id").Find(&users)

BeLongs ToпјҡеұһдәҺ

belongs to дјҡдёҺеҸҰдёҖдёӘжЁЎеһӢе»әз«ӢдәҶдёҖеҜ№дёҖзҡ„иҝһжҺҘгҖӮ иҝҷз§ҚжЁЎеһӢзҡ„жҜҸдёҖдёӘе®һдҫӢйғҪвҖңеұһдәҺвҖқеҸҰдёҖдёӘжЁЎеһӢзҡ„дёҖдёӘе®һдҫӢгҖӮ

// `User` еұһдәҺ `Company`пјҢ`CompanyID` жҳҜеӨ–й”®
type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name      string
	CompanyID int
	Company   Company
}

type Company struct {
	ID   int
	Name string
}

йҮҚеҶҷеӨ–й”®

foreignKeyпјҡйҮҚеҶҷеӨ–й”®пјҢеҸҜд»ҘдёҚз”ЁеӨ–й”®иЎЁ+IDиҝҷз§ҚеҪўејҸ

й»ҳи®ӨеӨ–й”®жҳҜеӨ–й”®иЎЁзҡ„еҗҚз§°+IDпјҢеҲӣе»әйЎәеәҸдёәе…ҲеҲӣе»әUserеҗҺеҲӣе»әCreditCardпјӣDB.AutoMigrate(&User{}, &CreditCard{})

type User struct {
  gorm.Model
  Name         string
  CompanyRefer int
  Company      Company `gorm:"foreignKey:CompanyRefer"`
  // дҪҝз”Ё CompanyRefer дҪңдёәеӨ–й”®
}

type Company struct {
  ID   int
  Name string
}

йҮҚеҶҷеј•з”Ё

referencesпјҡйҮҚеҶҷеј•з”ЁпјҢй»ҳи®Өеј•з”Ёзҡ„жҳҜIDпјҢдҪҝз”ЁreferencesеҸҜд»Ҙжӣҙж”№еј•з”Ёпјӣ

item.title: GinдҪҝз”Ёhttps
item.description:
package main

import (
   "fmt"
   "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)
import "github.com/unrolled/secure"

func loadTsl() gin.HandlerFunc {
   return func(context *gin.Context) {
      sec := secure.New(secure.Options{SSLRedirect: true, SSLHost: "localhost:8080"})
      err := sec.Process(context.Writer, context.Request)
      if err != nil {
         fmt.Println(err)
         return
      }
      context.Next()
   }
}

func main() {
   engine := gin.Default()
   engine.Use(loadTsl())
   engine.GET("/", func(context *gin.Context) {
      context.JSON(200, gin.H{
         "msg": "success",
      })
   })
   engine.RunTLS(":8080", "helloWorld/certClient/client.pem", "helloWorld/certClient/client.key")
}

item.title: git
item.description:
git initпјҡеңЁеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ•еҲқе§ӢеҢ–дёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„ Git д»“еә“гҖӮ

git clone <repository>пјҡе…ӢйҡҶиҝңзЁӢд»Јз Ғд»“еә“еҲ°жң¬ең°гҖӮ

git add <file(s)>пјҡе°Ҷж–Үд»¶ж·»еҠ еҲ°жҡӮеӯҳеҢәпјҢеҮҶеӨҮжҸҗдәӨгҖӮ

git commit -m "<message>"пјҡжҸҗдәӨжҡӮеӯҳеҢәзҡ„ж”№еҠЁпјҢе№¶ж·»еҠ дёҖжқЎжҸҗдәӨдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ

git statusпјҡжҳҫзӨәе·ҘдҪңеҢәе’ҢжҡӮеӯҳеҢәзҡ„зҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮ

git diffпјҡжҳҫзӨәеҪ“еүҚжңӘжҡӮеӯҳзҡ„ж”№еҠЁгҖӮ

git diff --stagedпјҡжҳҫзӨәе·ІжҡӮеӯҳдҪҶжңӘжҸҗдәӨзҡ„ж”№еҠЁгҖӮ

git logпјҡжҳҫзӨәжҸҗдәӨи®°еҪ•гҖӮ

git branchпјҡжҳҫзӨәеҲҶж”ҜеҲ—иЎЁгҖӮ

git branch <branch-name>пјҡеҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°еҲҶж”ҜгҖӮ

git checkout <branch-name>пјҡеҲҮжҚўеҲ°жҢҮе®ҡеҲҶж”ҜгҖӮ

git checkout -b <branch-name>пјҡеҲӣе»әе№¶еҲҮжҚўеҲ°дёҖдёӘж–°еҲҶж”ҜгҖӮ

git merge <branch-name>пјҡе°ҶжҢҮе®ҡеҲҶж”ҜеҗҲе№¶еҲ°еҪ“еүҚеҲҶж”ҜгҖӮ

git remote add <remote-name> <repository-url>пјҡж·»еҠ дёҖдёӘиҝңзЁӢд»Јз Ғд»“еә“гҖӮ

git push <remote-name> <branch-name>пјҡе°Ҷжң¬ең°еҲҶж”ҜжҺЁйҖҒеҲ°иҝңзЁӢд»“еә“гҖӮ

git pull <remote-name> <branch-name>пјҡд»ҺиҝңзЁӢд»“еә“жӢүеҸ–жңҖж–°зҡ„ж”№еҠЁгҖӮ

git fetch <remote-name>пјҡд»ҺиҝңзЁӢд»“еә“иҺ·еҸ–жңҖж–°зҡ„ж”№еҠЁпјҢдҪҶдёҚеҗҲе№¶еҲ°еҪ“еүҚеҲҶж”ҜгҖӮ

git reset <commit>пјҡж’Өй”ҖжҸҗдәӨпјҢе№¶е°Ҷд»Јз Ғеӣһж»ҡеҲ°жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„жҸҗдәӨгҖӮ

git revert <commit>пјҡж’Өй”ҖжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„жҸҗдәӨпјҢе№¶еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„жҸҗдәӨжқҘи®°еҪ•ж’Өй”Җж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ

git reset е’Ң git revert жҳҜ Git дёӯз”ЁдәҺж’Өй”ҖжҸҗдәӨзҡ„дёӨдёӘе‘Ҫд»ӨпјҢе®ғд»¬жңүд»ҘдёӢеҢәеҲ«пјҡ

item.title: goдҪҝз”Ёcasbin
item.description:
е®ҳзҪ‘пјҡ

https://casbin.org/zh-CN/

sub, obj, act иЎЁзӨәз»Ҹе…ёдёүе…ғз»„: и®ҝй—®е®һдҪ“ (Subject)пјҢи®ҝй—®иө„жәҗ (Object) е’Ңи®ҝй—®ж–№жі• (Action)пјҢиҝҳжңүдёҖдёӘeftиҝҷжқЎеұһжҖ§й»ҳи®Өе°ұжҳҜallowпјҢдёҚеЈ°жҳҺе°ұжҳҜй»ҳи®Өзҡ„пјҢеҰӮжһңеЈ°жҳҺзҡ„иҜқж”№еұһжҖ§еҸӘиғҪжҳҜallow/deny

ACLжЁЎеһӢ

дҫӢпјҡ

[request_definition] r = sub, obj, act

еҜ№еә”Requestзҡ„ alice, data1, read д№ҹе°ұжҳҜsub=aliceпјӣobj=data1пјӣact=read

[policy_definition] p = sub, obj, act

еҜ№еә”policyзҡ„ p, alice, data1, read пјӣp, bob, data2, write еұһжҖ§

[matchers] m = r.sub p.sub && r.obj p.obj && r.act p.act

Rе’ҢPзҡ„еҜ№еә”жі•еҲҷ

[policy_effect] e = some(where (p.eft allow))

еҸӘиғҪжҳҜд»ҘдёӢеҮ жқЎдёҚиғҪиҮӘе®ҡд№ү

some(where (p.eft allow))пјӣ

!some(where (p.eft deny))пјӣ

item.title: ssl/tlsиҜҒд№ҰиҮӘзӯҫ
item.description:
go1.15д»ҘеҗҺеҝ…йЎ»жҳҜSANиҜҒд№Ұ

йңҖиҰҒдёӢиҪҪopenssl

macдёӢиҪҪж–№жі•пјҡbrew install openssl

з”ҹжҲҗ CA ж №иҜҒд№Ұ

genrsa -out ca.key 2048

req -new -x509 -days 3650 -key ca.key -out ca.pem

з”ҹжҲҗжңҚеҠЎз«ҜиҜҒд№Ұ

genpkey -algorithm RSA -out server.key

req -new -nodes -key server.key -out server.csr -days 3650 -subj “/C=cn/OU=custer/O=custer/CN=localhost” -config ./openssl.cnf -extensions v3_req

x509 -req -days 3650 -in server.csr -out server.pem -CA ca.pem -CAkey ca.key -CAcreateserial -extfile ./openssl.cnf -extensions v3_req

з”ҹжҲҗе®ўжҲ·з«ҜиҜҒд№Ұ

genpkey -algorithm RSA -out client.key

item.title: goдҪҝз”ЁJwt
item.description:
package jwt

import (
	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v4"
	"github.com/spf13/viper"
	"time"
)

type Claims struct {
	UserId int
	jwt.RegisteredClaims
}

func CreateToken(id int) (string, error) {
	accessJwtKey := []byte(viper.GetString("token.secret"))
	expirationTime := time.Now().Add(60 * time.Minute) // 5еҲҶй’ҹжңүж•Ҳ

	claims := Claims{
		UserId: id,
		RegisteredClaims: jwt.RegisteredClaims{
			ExpiresAt: jwt.NewNumericDate(expirationTime),
			Issuer:    "233",
		},
	}
	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, &claims)
	return token.SignedString(accessJwtKey)
}

func GetPayload(token string) (int, error) {
	parser := jwt.NewParser()
	var claims Claims
	_, _, err := parser.ParseUnverified(token, &claims)
	return claims.UserId, err
}

func VerifyToken(token string) error {
	accessJwtKey := []byte(viper.GetString("token.secret"))
	_, err := jwt.Parse(token, func(token *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
		return accessJwtKey, nil
	})
	return err
}

item.title: йј ж ҮиҮӘеҠЁеҢ–
item.description:
package mou

import "github.com/go-vgo/robotgo"

func aa() {
   /* ========================= жҢүй”®ж“ҚдҪң ======================== */

   // еҗ‘дёҠж»ҡеҠЁпјҡ3иЎҢ
   robotgo.ScrollMouse(3, `up`)
   // еҗ‘дёӢж»ҡеҠЁпјҡ2иЎҢ
   robotgo.ScrollMouse(2, `down`)

   // жҢүдёӢйј ж Үе·Ұй”®
   // з¬¬1дёӘеҸӮж•°пјҡleft(е·Ұй”®) / center(дёӯй”®пјҢеҚіпјҡж»ҡиҪ®) / right(еҸій”®)
   // з¬¬2дёӘеҸӮж•°пјҡжҳҜеҗҰеҸҢеҮ»
   robotgo.MouseClick(`left`, false)

   // жҢүдҪҸйј ж Үе·Ұй”®
   robotgo.MouseToggle(`down`, `left`)
   // и§ЈйҷӨжҢүдҪҸйј ж Үе·Ұй”®
   robotgo.MouseToggle(`up`, `left`)

   /* ========================= дҪҚзҪ®ж“ҚдҪң ======================== */

   // е°Ҷйј ж Үз§»еҠЁеҲ°еұҸе№• x:800 y:400 зҡ„дҪҚзҪ®пјҲй—ӘзҺ°еҲ°жҢҮе®ҡдҪҚзҪ®пјү
   robotgo.MoveMouse(800, 400)

   // е°Ҷйј ж Үз§»еҠЁеҲ°еұҸе№• x:800 y:400 зҡ„дҪҚзҪ®пјҲжЁЎд»ҝдәәзұ»ж“ҚдҪңпјү
   robotgo.MoveMouseSmooth(800, 400)

   // е°Ҷйј ж Үз§»еҠЁеҲ°еұҸе№• x:800 y:400 зҡ„дҪҚзҪ®пјҲжЁЎд»ҝдәәзұ»ж“ҚдҪңпјү
   // з¬¬3дёӘеҸӮж•°пјҡзәөеқҗж Үx зҡ„е»¶иҝҹеҲ°иҫҫж—¶й—ҙ
   // з¬¬4дёӘеҸӮж•°пјҡжЁӘеқҗж Үy зҡ„е»¶иҝҹеҲ°иҫҫж—¶й—ҙ
   robotgo.MoveMouseSmooth(800, 400, 20.0, 200.0)

   /* ========================= з»„еҗҲж“ҚдҪң ======================== */

   // з§»еҠЁйј ж ҮеҲ° x:800 y:400 еҗҺпјҢеҸҢеҮ»йј ж Үе·Ұй”®
   robotgo.MoveClick(800, 400, `left`, true)

   /* ========================= жүҖеңЁдҪҚзҪ® ======================== */

   // иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚйј ж ҮжүҖеңЁзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®
   x, y := robotgo.GetMousePos()
   println(`xпјҡ`, x, ` yпјҡ`, y)
}

item.title: GoWebsocket
item.description:
htmlйЎөйқў

жөӢиҜ•дҪҝз”Ё

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>abc</title>
</head>
<body>
<script type="text/javascript">
    var sock = null;
  	// з«ҜеҸЈдҝ®ж”№
    var wsuri = "ws://localhost:8080/a";

    window.onload = function() {
        sock = new WebSocket(wsuri);
        //е»әз«ӢиҝһжҺҘеҗҺи§ҰеҸ‘
        sock.onopen = function() {
            console.log(" е»әз«ӢиҝһжҺҘеҗҺи§ҰеҸ‘ connected to " + wsuri);
        }
        // е…ій—ӯиҝһжҺҘж—¶еҖҷи§ҰеҸ‘
        sock.onclose = function(e) {
            console.log("е…ій—ӯиҝһжҺҘж—¶еҖҷи§ҰеҸ‘ connection closed (" + e.code + ")");
        }
        // ж”¶еҲ°ж¶ҲжҒҜеҗҺи§ҰеҸ‘
        sock.onmessage = function(e) {
            console.log("ж”¶еҲ°ж¶ҲжҒҜеҗҺи§ҰеҸ‘ message received: " + e.data);
        }
        //еҸ‘з”ҹй”ҷиҜҜзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷи§ҰеҸ‘
        sock.onerror=function (e) {
            console.log("еҸ‘з”ҹй”ҷиҜҜж—¶еҖҷи§ҰеҸ‘"+wsuri)
        }
    };
    //еҰӮжһңsockиў«е…ій—ӯжҺүдәҶиҝҷйҮҢд№ҹдјҡжҠҘй”ҷзҡ„
    function send() {
        var msg = document.getElementById('message').value;
        sock.send(msg);
    };
</script>
<h1>GoWebSocketDemo</h1>
<form>
    <p>
        Message: <input id="message" type="text" value="aa">
    </p>
</form>
<button onclick="send();">з»ҷжңҚеҠЎеҷЁеҸ‘йҖҒж¶ҲжҒҜ</button>
</body>
</html>

goзҡ„httpеҢ…е®һзҺ°

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"golang.org/x/net/websocket"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	http.Handle("/", websocket.Handler(Echo))
	if err := http.ListenAndServe("127.0.0.1:9999", nil); err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
}

func Echo(w *websocket.Conn) {
	for {
		var reply string
		if err := websocket.Message.Receive(w, &reply); err != nil {
			fmt.Println("err:", err)
			break
		}
		msg := "get:" + reply
		fmt.Println(msg)
		if err := websocket.Message.Send(w, msg); err != nil {
			fmt.Println("err:", err)
			break
		}
	}
}

Ginе®һзҺ°

package main

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/net/websocket"
)

func websocketHandler(handler websocket.Handler) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(context *gin.Context) {
		if context.IsWebsocket() {
			handler.ServeHTTP(context.Writer, context.Request)
		} else {
			context.JSON(200, gin.H{
				"msg": "err",
			})
			context.Abort()
		}
	}
}

func websocketConn(conn *websocket.Conn) {
	websocket.Message.Send(conn, "aaa")
}

func main() {
	app := gin.Default()

	app.GET("/ws", websocketHandler(websocketConn))

	app.Run("80")
}

item.title: Go Email
item.description:
package test

import (
   "crypto/tls"
   "fmt"
   "gopkg.in/gomail.v2"
)

var (
   host     = "smtp.qq.com"
   port     = 25
   password = "йӮ®з®ұеҜҶз Ғ"
   username = "йӮ®з®ұid"
   to       = "еҸ‘йҖҒиҖ…зҡ„йӮ®з®ұid"
)

func Send() {
   message := gomail.NewMessage()
   message.SetHeader("From", username)
   message.SetHeader("To", to)
   message.SetHeader("Subject", "TEST")
   message.SetBody("text/html", "<h1 style='color:red'>123</h1>")
   dialer := gomail.NewDialer(host, port, username, password)
   dialer.TLSConfig = &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true}
   err := dialer.DialAndSend(message)
   if err != nil {
      fmt.Println(err)
   } else {
      fmt.Println("ok")
   }
}

item.title: Ginж—Ҙеҝ—иҮӘе®ҡд№ү
item.description:
еҝ…йЎ»и®ҫзҪ®ж–Үд»¶жңүеҶҷжқғйҷҗпјҡ0777

var logFile io.Writer

func init() {
   logFile, _ = os.OpenFile("./log/log.log", os.O_CREATE|os.O_APPEND|os.O_WRONLY, 0777)
   log.SetOutput(io.MultiWriter(logFile, os.Stdout))
   log.SetFlags(log.Ldate | log.Lshortfile | log.Lmicroseconds)
}
func main() {
   app := gin.Default()
   // йқһй”ҷиҜҜж—Ҙеҝ—еҶҷе…Ҙзҡ„ж–Үд»¶
   gin.DefaultWriter = io.MultiWriter(logFile, os.Stdout)
   // й”ҷиҜҜж—Ҙеҝ—еҶҷе…Ҙзҡ„ж–Үд»¶
   gin.DefaultErrorWriter = io.MultiWriter(logFile, os.Stdout)
   // debugиҫ“еҮәж јејҸ
   gin.DebugPrintRouteFunc = func(httpMethod, absolutePath, handlerName string, nuHandlers int) {
      log.Printf("endpoint %v %v %v %v\n", httpMethod, absolutePath, handlerName, nuHandlers)
   }
   // иҮӘе®ҡд№үж—Ҙеҝ—ж јејҸ
   app.Use(gin.LoggerWithFormatter(func(param gin.LogFormatterParams) string {
      return fmt.Sprintf("%s - [%s] \"%s %s %s %d %s \"%s\" %s\"\n",
         param.ClientIP,
         param.TimeStamp.Format(time.RFC1123),
         param.Method,
         param.Path,
         param.Request.Proto,
         param.StatusCode,
         param.Latency,
         param.Request.UserAgent(),
         param.ErrorMessage,
      )
   }))

   err := app.Run("127.0.0.1:8888")
   if err != nil {
      panic(err)
   }
}

item.title: GoдҪҝз”Ёд»ӨзүҢжЎ¶
item.description:
д»ӨзүҢжЎ¶з®—жі•жҳҜзҪ‘з»ңжөҒйҮҸж•ҙеҪўпјҲTraffic Shapingпјүе’ҢйҖҹзҺҮйҷҗеҲ¶пјҲRate LimitingпјүдёӯжңҖеёёдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„дёҖз§Қз®—жі•гҖӮе…ёеһӢжғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢд»ӨзүҢжЎ¶з®—жі•з”ЁжқҘжҺ§еҲ¶еҸ‘йҖҒеҲ°зҪ‘з»ңдёҠзҡ„ж•°жҚ®зҡ„ж•°зӣ®пјҢе№¶е…Ғи®ёзӘҒеҸ‘ж•°жҚ®зҡ„еҸ‘йҖҒгҖӮ

еҲӣе»әдҪҝз”Ё

package tokenBucket

import (
   "log"
   "sync"
   "time"
)

type TokensBucket struct {
   limiter float64    //йҖҹзҺҮ
   burst   int        //жЎ¶еӨ§е°Ҹ
   mu      sync.Mutex //й”Ғ
   tokens  float64    //жЎ¶йҮҢйқўзҡ„д»ӨзүҢж•°йҮҸ
   last    time.Time  //жңҖеҗҺдёҖж¬Ўж¶ҲиҖ—д»ӨзүҢзҡ„ж—¶й—ҙ
}

// NewTokensBucket еҲӣе»әд»ӨзүҢжЎ¶
func NewTokensBucket(limiter float64, burst int) *TokensBucket {
   return &TokensBucket{limiter: limiter, burst: burst}
}

// Allow дҪҝз”ЁпјҢжҜҸж¬Ўж¶ҲиҖ—дёҖдёӘд»ӨзүҢ
func (t *TokensBucket) Allow() bool {
   return t.AllowN(time.Now(), 1)
}

// AllowN еҪ“еүҚж—¶й—ҙпјҢдёҖж¬Ўж¶ҲиҖ—зҡ„д»ӨзүҢ
func (t *TokensBucket) AllowN(now time.Time, i int) bool {
   t.mu.Lock()
   defer t.mu.Unlock()
   //еҪ“еүҚж—¶й—ҙ-жңҖеҗҺдёҖж¬Ўж·»еҠ д»ӨзүҢзҡ„ж—¶й—ҙ * жЎ¶йҖҹзҺҮ = еә”иҜҘиЎҘе……зҡ„д»ӨзүҢ
   delta := now.Sub(t.last).Seconds() * t.limiter
   t.tokens += delta
   //жЎ¶еҶ…д»ӨзүҢ > жЎ¶жҖ»еӨ§е°Ҹ  =  еҸӘиЎҘе……жңҖеӨ§д»ӨзүҢж•°
   if t.tokens > float64(t.burst) {
      t.tokens = float64(t.burst)
   }
   //жЎ¶еҶ…д»ӨзүҢ < йңҖиҰҒзҡ„д»ӨзүҢ = иҝ”еӣһfalse
   if t.tokens < float64(i) {
      return false
   }
   //еҗҰеҲҷиҝ”еӣһtrueпјҢе№¶з”ЁжЎ¶зҡ„еү©дҪҷд»ӨзүҢ - ж¶ҲиҖ—д»ӨзүҢ
   t.tokens -= float64(i)
   //жЎ¶жңҖеҗҺдёҖж¬ЎиЎҘе……ж—¶й—ҙйҮҚзҪ®дёәеҪ“еүҚж—¶й—ҙ
   t.last = now
   //иҝ”еӣһtrue
   return true
}

жөӢиҜ•

func main() {
   bucket := NewTokensBucket(3, 5)
   for true {
      n := 4
      for i := 0; i < n; i++ {
         go func(i int) {
            if bucket.Allow() {
               log.Printf("allow [%d]", i)
            } else {
               log.Printf("forbid [%d]", i)
            }
         }(i)
      }
      time.Sleep(time.Second)
      log.Println("========================================")
   }
}

ginеҹәжң¬дҪҝз”Ё

func main() {
	app := gin.Default()
	bucket := tokenBucket.NewTokensBucket(1, 2)
	app.Use(func(context *gin.Context) {
    
   //жӢҝеҲ°д»ӨзүҢе°ұз»ҷж”ҫиЎҢ
		if bucket.Allow() {
			context.Next()
    //жӢҝдёҚеҲ°е°ұдёҚз»ҷиҝҮ
		} else {
			context.JSON(500, gin.H{
				"msg": "false",
			})
			context.Abort()
		}
	})
	app.GET("/", func(context *gin.Context) {
		context.JSON(200, gin.H{
			"msg": "success",
		})
	})
	app.Run(":80")
}

item.title: Zap
item.description:
zap

ж—Ҙеҝ—й…ҚзҪ®

func getZapConfig() zapcore.EncoderConfig {
	c := zap.NewProductionEncoderConfig()
	c.EncodeTime = func(t time.Time, pae zapcore.PrimitiveArrayEncoder) {
		pae.AppendString(t.Format(("[GIN_ZVCJ] " + "2006/01/02 - 15:04:05.000")))
	}
	c.EncodeLevel = func(l zapcore.Level, pae zapcore.PrimitiveArrayEncoder) {
		pae.AppendString("[" + l.CapitalString() + "]")
	}
	c.EncodeCaller = func(ec zapcore.EntryCaller, pae zapcore.PrimitiveArrayEncoder) {
		pae.AppendString("[" + ec.TrimmedPath() + "]")
	}
	return c
}

ж—Ҙеҝ—еҲҶеүІ

func getZapWrite(filename string) zapcore.WriteSyncer {
	lumberjack := &lumberjack.Logger{
		Filename:   filename,
		MaxSize:    10,
		MaxAge:     30,
		MaxBackups: 5,
		Compress:   true,
	}
	return zapcore.AddSync(lumberjack)
}

еҲӣе»әcore

func newZapCore(filename string, level zapcore.LevelEnabler) zapcore.Core {
	return zapcore.NewCore(getZapEncode(), getZapWrite(filename), level)
}

func getZapEncode() zapcore.Encoder {
	return zapcore.NewConsoleEncoder(getZapConfig())
}

ж—Ҙеҝ—еҲқе§ӢеҢ–

func ZapInit() *zap.Logger {
	info := zap.LevelEnablerFunc(func(l zapcore.Level) bool {
		return l == zap.InfoLevel
	})
	debug := zap.LevelEnablerFunc(func(l zapcore.Level) bool {
		return l == zap.DebugLevel
	})
	warn := zap.LevelEnablerFunc(func(l zapcore.Level) bool {
		return l == zap.WarnLevel
	})
	error := zap.LevelEnablerFunc(func(l zapcore.Level) bool {
		return l >= zap.ErrorLevel
	})

	t := time.Now().Format("2006-01-02")
	cores := [...]zapcore.Core{
		newZapCore(fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s/info.log", "log", t), info),
		newZapCore(fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s/debug.log", "debug", t), debug),
		newZapCore(fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s/warn.log", "warn", t), warn),
		newZapCore(fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s/error.log", "error", t), error),
	}
	return zap.New(zapcore.NewTee(cores[:]...), zap.AddCaller())
}

ginдҪҝз”Ёzapж—Ҙеҝ—

й…ҚзҪ®ginеӨ„зҗҶ

// ж—Ҙеҝ—еӨ„зҗҶ
func GinLogger() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		start := time.Now()
		path := c.Request.URL.Path
		query := c.Request.URL.RawQuery
		c.Next()
		cost := time.Since(start)
		global.GZV_LOG.Info(path,
			zap.Int("status", c.Writer.Status()),
			zap.String("method", c.Request.Method),
			zap.String("path", path),
			zap.String("query", query),
			zap.String("ip", c.ClientIP()),
			zap.String("user-agent", c.Request.UserAgent()),
			zap.String("errors", c.Errors.ByType(gin.ErrorTypePrivate).String()),
			zap.Duration("cost", cost),
		)
	}
}

// й”ҷиҜҜеӨ„зҗҶ
func GinRecovery(stack bool) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		defer func() {
			if err := recover(); err != nil {
				var brokenPipe bool
				if ne, ok := err.(*net.OpError); ok {
					if se, ok := ne.Err.(*os.SyscallError); ok {
						if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(se.Error()), "broken pipe") || strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(se.Error()), "connection reset by peer") {
							brokenPipe = true
						}
					}
				}

				httpRequest, _ := httputil.DumpRequest(c.Request, false)
				if brokenPipe {
					global.GZV_LOG.Error(c.Request.URL.Path,
						zap.Any("error", err),
						zap.String("request", string(httpRequest)),
					)
					c.Error(err.(error))
					c.Abort()
					return
				}

				if stack {
					global.GZV_LOG.Error("[Recovery from panic]",
						zap.Any("error", err),
						zap.String("request", string(httpRequest)),
						zap.String("stack", string(debug.Stack())),
					)
				} else {
					global.GZV_LOG.Error("[Recovery from panic]",
						zap.Any("error", err),
						zap.String("request", string(httpRequest)),
					)
				}
				c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
			}
		}()
		c.Next()
	}
}

дҪҝз”Ё

e := gin.Default()
e.Use(config.GinRecovery(true), config.GinLogger())

item.title: SpringCloud
item.description:
Spring Cloud Alibaba

д»Ӣз»Қ

Spring Cloud Alibaba иҮҙеҠӣдәҺжҸҗдҫӣеҫ®жңҚеҠЎејҖеҸ‘зҡ„дёҖз«ҷејҸи§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲгҖӮжӯӨйЎ№зӣ®еҢ…еҗ«ејҖеҸ‘еҲҶеёғејҸеә”з”Ёеҫ®жңҚеҠЎзҡ„еҝ…йңҖз»„д»¶пјҢж–№дҫҝејҖеҸ‘иҖ…йҖҡиҝҮ Spring Cloud зј–зЁӢжЁЎеһӢиҪ»жқҫдҪҝз”Ёиҝҷдәӣз»„д»¶жқҘејҖеҸ‘еҲҶеёғејҸеә”з”ЁжңҚеҠЎгҖӮ

дҫқжүҳ Spring Cloud AlibabaпјҢжӮЁеҸӘйңҖиҰҒж·»еҠ дёҖдәӣжіЁи§Је’Ңе°‘йҮҸй…ҚзҪ®пјҢе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙе°Ҷ Spring Cloud еә”з”ЁжҺҘе…ҘйҳҝйҮҢеҫ®жңҚеҠЎи§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲпјҢйҖҡиҝҮйҳҝйҮҢдёӯй—ҙд»¶жқҘиҝ…йҖҹжҗӯе»әеҲҶеёғејҸеә”з”Ёзі»з»ҹгҖӮ

дё»иҰҒеҠҹиғҪ

  • жңҚеҠЎйҷҗжөҒйҷҚзә§пјҡй»ҳи®Өж”ҜжҢҒ WebServletгҖҒWebFlux, OpenFeignгҖҒRestTemplateгҖҒSpring Cloud Gateway, Zuul, Dubbo е’Ң RocketMQ йҷҗжөҒйҷҚзә§еҠҹиғҪзҡ„жҺҘе…ҘпјҢеҸҜд»ҘеңЁиҝҗиЎҢж—¶йҖҡиҝҮжҺ§еҲ¶еҸ°е®һж—¶дҝ®ж”№йҷҗжөҒйҷҚзә§и§„еҲҷпјҢиҝҳж”ҜжҢҒжҹҘзңӢйҷҗжөҒйҷҚзә§ Metrics зӣ‘жҺ§гҖӮ
  • жңҚеҠЎжіЁеҶҢдёҺеҸ‘зҺ°пјҡйҖӮй…Қ Spring Cloud жңҚеҠЎжіЁеҶҢдёҺеҸ‘зҺ°ж ҮеҮҶпјҢй»ҳи®ӨйӣҶжҲҗдәҶ Ribbon зҡ„ж”ҜжҢҒгҖӮ
  • еҲҶеёғејҸй…ҚзҪ®з®ЎзҗҶпјҡж”ҜжҢҒеҲҶеёғејҸзі»з»ҹдёӯзҡ„еӨ–йғЁеҢ–й…ҚзҪ®пјҢй…ҚзҪ®жӣҙж”№ж—¶иҮӘеҠЁеҲ·ж–°гҖӮ
  • ж¶ҲжҒҜй©ұеҠЁиғҪеҠӣпјҡеҹәдәҺ Spring Cloud Stream дёәеҫ®жңҚеҠЎеә”з”Ёжһ„е»әж¶ҲжҒҜй©ұеҠЁиғҪеҠӣгҖӮ
  • еҲҶеёғејҸдәӢеҠЎпјҡдҪҝз”Ё @GlobalTransactional жіЁи§ЈпјҢ й«ҳж•Ҳе№¶дё”еҜ№дёҡеҠЎйӣ¶дҫөе…Ҙең°и§ЈеҶіеҲҶеёғејҸдәӢеҠЎй—®йўҳгҖӮ
  • йҳҝйҮҢдә‘еҜ№иұЎеӯҳеӮЁпјҡйҳҝйҮҢдә‘жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„жө·йҮҸгҖҒе®үе…ЁгҖҒдҪҺжҲҗжң¬гҖҒй«ҳеҸҜйқ зҡ„дә‘еӯҳеӮЁжңҚеҠЎгҖӮж”ҜжҢҒеңЁд»»дҪ•еә”з”ЁгҖҒд»»дҪ•ж—¶й—ҙгҖҒд»»дҪ•ең°зӮ№еӯҳеӮЁе’Ңи®ҝй—®д»»ж„Ҹзұ»еһӢзҡ„ж•°жҚ®гҖӮ
  • еҲҶеёғејҸд»»еҠЎи°ғеәҰпјҡжҸҗдҫӣз§’зә§гҖҒзІҫеҮҶгҖҒй«ҳеҸҜйқ гҖҒй«ҳеҸҜз”Ёзҡ„е®ҡж—¶пјҲеҹәдәҺ Cron иЎЁиҫҫејҸпјүд»»еҠЎи°ғеәҰжңҚеҠЎгҖӮеҗҢж—¶жҸҗдҫӣеҲҶеёғејҸзҡ„д»»еҠЎжү§иЎҢжЁЎеһӢпјҢеҰӮзҪ‘ж јд»»еҠЎгҖӮзҪ‘ж јд»»еҠЎж”ҜжҢҒжө·йҮҸеӯҗд»»еҠЎеқҮеҢҖеҲҶй…ҚеҲ°жүҖжңү WorkerпјҲschedulerx-clientпјүдёҠжү§иЎҢгҖӮ
  • йҳҝйҮҢдә‘зҹӯдҝЎжңҚеҠЎпјҡиҰҶзӣ–е…Ёзҗғзҡ„зҹӯдҝЎжңҚеҠЎпјҢеҸӢеҘҪгҖҒй«ҳж•ҲгҖҒжҷәиғҪзҡ„дә’иҒ”еҢ–йҖҡи®ҜиғҪеҠӣпјҢеё®еҠ©дјҒдёҡиҝ…йҖҹжҗӯе»әе®ўжҲ·и§ҰиҫҫйҖҡйҒ“

з»„д»¶

  • SentinelпјҡжҠҠжөҒйҮҸдҪңдёәеҲҮе…ҘзӮ№пјҢд»ҺжөҒйҮҸжҺ§еҲ¶гҖҒзҶ”ж–ӯйҷҚзә§гҖҒзі»з»ҹиҙҹиҪҪдҝқжҠӨзӯүеӨҡдёӘз»ҙеәҰдҝқжҠӨжңҚеҠЎзҡ„зЁіе®ҡжҖ§гҖӮ

  • NacosпјҡдёҖдёӘжӣҙжҳ“дәҺжһ„е»әдә‘еҺҹз”ҹеә”з”Ёзҡ„еҠЁжҖҒжңҚеҠЎеҸ‘зҺ°гҖҒй…ҚзҪ®з®ЎзҗҶе’ҢжңҚеҠЎз®ЎзҗҶе№іеҸ°гҖӮ

  • RocketMQпјҡдёҖж¬ҫејҖжәҗзҡ„еҲҶеёғејҸж¶ҲжҒҜзі»з»ҹпјҢеҹәдәҺй«ҳеҸҜз”ЁеҲҶеёғејҸйӣҶзҫӨжҠҖжңҜпјҢжҸҗдҫӣдҪҺе»¶ж—¶зҡ„гҖҒй«ҳеҸҜйқ зҡ„ж¶ҲжҒҜеҸ‘еёғдёҺи®ўйҳ…жңҚеҠЎгҖӮ

  • DubboпјҡApache Dubboв„ў жҳҜдёҖж¬ҫй«ҳжҖ§иғҪ Java RPC жЎҶжһ¶гҖӮ

  • SeataпјҡйҳҝйҮҢе·ҙе·ҙејҖжәҗдә§е“ҒпјҢдёҖдёӘжҳ“дәҺдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„й«ҳжҖ§иғҪеҫ®жңҚеҠЎеҲҶеёғејҸдәӢеҠЎи§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲгҖӮ

  • Alibaba Cloud OSS: йҳҝйҮҢдә‘еҜ№иұЎеӯҳеӮЁжңҚеҠЎпјҲObject Storage ServiceпјҢз®Җз§° OSSпјүпјҢжҳҜйҳҝйҮҢдә‘жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„жө·йҮҸгҖҒе®үе…ЁгҖҒдҪҺжҲҗжң¬гҖҒй«ҳеҸҜйқ зҡ„дә‘еӯҳеӮЁжңҚеҠЎгҖӮжӮЁеҸҜд»ҘеңЁд»»дҪ•еә”з”ЁгҖҒд»»дҪ•ж—¶й—ҙгҖҒд»»дҪ•ең°зӮ№еӯҳеӮЁе’Ңи®ҝй—®д»»ж„Ҹзұ»еһӢзҡ„ж•°жҚ®гҖӮ

item.title: springBootж•ҙеҗҲrabbitMQ
item.description:
SpringBoot ж•ҙеҗҲ rabbitMQ

macе®үиЈ…brew install rabbitmq

application.ymlи®ҫзҪ®

spring:
rabbitmq:
host: 47.115.50.193
username: admin
password: admin

еҲӣе»әдәӨжҚўжңәпјҢж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—пјҢе№¶иҝӣиЎҢз»‘е®ҡ

@Configuration
public class RabbitMQConfig {
    private static final String TOPIC_NAME = "top_name";
    private static final String QUEUE_NAME = "queue_name";
    //дәӨжҚўжңә
    @Bean("queueEx")
    public Exchange queueEx(){
        return ExchangeBuilder.topicExchange(TOPIC_NAME).durable(true).build();
    }
    //ж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—
    @Bean("queue")
    public Queue queue(){
        return QueueBuilder.durable(QUEUE_NAME).build();
    }
    //з»‘е®ҡ
    @Bean
    public Binding queueExchange(@Qualifier("queueEx") Exchange exchange,@Qualifier("queue") Queue queue){
        return BindingBuilder.bind(queue).to(exchange).with("a.#").noargs();
    }
}

@Autowired
private RabbitTemplate rabbitTemplate;

з”ҹдә§иҖ…

public void q(){
rabbitTemplate.convertAndSend("top_name","a.qwe","rabbitmqboot");
}

ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…

@RabbitListener(queues = "queue_name") //и®ҫзҪ®иҰҒзӣ‘еҗ¬зҡ„ж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҹеҲ—
public void listenerq(Message message,Channel channel){
System.out.println(new String(message.getBody()));
}

ж¶ҲжҒҜеҸҜйқ жҠ•йҖ’

Application.ymlй…ҚзҪ®

rabbitmq:
publisher-confirm-type: correlated

Javaд»Јз Ғй…ҚзҪ®

package com.xiaoyu.config;

import org.springframework.amqp.core.ReturnedMessage;
import org.springframework.amqp.rabbit.connection.CorrelationData;
import org.springframework.amqp.rabbit.core.RabbitTemplate;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;

import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;

@Component
public class PubConfirmAndReturn implements RabbitTemplate.ReturnsCallback,RabbitTemplate.ConfirmCallback{

@Autowired
RabbitTemplate rabbitTemplate;

@PostConstruct
public void init(){
  rabbitTemplate.setReturnsCallback(this);
  rabbitTemplate.setConfirmCallback(this);
}

//confirmзЎ®е®ҡжЁЎејҸ
@Override
public void confirm(CorrelationData correlationData, boolean b, String s) {
  if (b) {
      System.out.println("ж¶ҲжҒҜеҸ‘йҖҒеҲ°exchangeжҲҗеҠҹ");
  } else {
      System.out.println("еӨұиҙҘеҺҹеӣ пјҡ"+ s);
  }
}

//returnйҖҖеӣһжЁЎејҸ
@Override
public void returnedMessage(ReturnedMessage returnedMessage) {
  System.out.println("ж¶ҲжҒҜйҖҒexchangeеҲ°queueеӨұиҙҘпјҢиҜҰжғ…дёәпјҡ");
  System.out.println("ж¶ҲжҒҜдё»дҪ“ message : "+new String(returnedMessage.getMessage().getBody()));
  System.out.println("жҸҸиҝ°пјҡ"+ returnedMessage.toString());
  System.out.println("ж¶ҲжҒҜдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„дәӨжҚўеҷЁ exchange : "+ returnedMessage.getExchange());
  System.out.println("ж¶ҲжҒҜдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„и·Ҝз”ұй”® routing : "+ returnedMessage.getRoutingKey());
}
}

rabbitmq ж•ҙдёӘж¶ҲжҒҜжҠ•йҖ’зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„дёәпјҡ

producerвҖ”>rabbitmq brokerвҖ”>exchangeвҖ”>queueвҖ”>consumer ж¶ҲжҒҜд»Һ producer еҲ° exchange еҲҷдјҡиҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘ confirmCallback зЎ®и®ӨжЁЎејҸгҖӮ ж¶ҲжҒҜд»Һ exchangeвҖ“>queue жҠ•йҖ’еӨұиҙҘеҲҷдјҡиҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘ returnCallbackйҖҖеӣһжЁЎејҸ гҖӮ

item.title: Java RabbitMQ
item.description:
е®үиЈ…пјҡ

  1. rpm -Uvh https://download.fedoraproject.org/pub/epel/epel-release-latest-7.noarch.rpm

  2. yum install erlang

  3. yum install socat

  4. rpm -Uvh https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server/releases/download/v3.8.0/rabbitmq-server-3.8.0-1.el7.noarch.rpm

  5. rpm –import https://www.rabbitmq.com/rabbitmq-release-signing-key.asc

  6. yum install rabbitmq-server-3.6.8-1.el7.noarch.rpm

  7. service rabbitmq-server start

  8. service rabbitmq-server status

  9. rabbitmq-service start ејҖе§ӢжңҚеҠЎ

Rabbitmq-service stop еҒңжӯўжңҚеҠЎ

rabbitmq-server -detached еҗҺеҸ°иҝҗиЎҢ

  • hello worldз®ҖеҚ•жЁЎејҸ

  • дёҖеҜ№дёҖпјҢдёҖдёӘз”ҹдә§иҖ…еҜ№еә”дёҖдёӘж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…гҖӮ

  • з®ҖеҚ•жЁЎејҸдёҚйңҖиҰҒеҲӣе»әдәӨжҚўжңәпјҢдҪҶжҳҜжңүдәӨжҚўжңәпјҢжҳҜдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨдәӨжҚўжңәгҖӮ

з”ҹдә§иҖ…

package com.xiaoyu.test1;

import com.rabbitmq.client.*;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException;

public class Pro_HelloWorld {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException, TimeoutException {
        //й…ҚзҪ®иҝһжҺҘдҝЎжҒҜ
        ConnectionFactory factory = new ConnectionFactory();
        factory.setHost("47.115.50.193");	//ip
        factory.setPort(5672);	//з«ҜеҸЈеҸ·
        factory.setVirtualHost("/");	//иҷҡжӢҹжңә
        factory.setUsername("admin");	//иҙҰжҲ·
        factory.setPassword("admin");	//еҜҶз Ғ
        //й…ҚзҪ®з®ЎйҒ“
        Connection connection = factory.newConnection();
        Channel channel = connection.createChannel();
        //йҳҹеҲ—еҲӣе»ә
        channel.queueDeclare("helloworld", true, false, false, null);
      /*	еҸӮж•°пјҡ
                queueпјҡйҳҹеҲ—еҗҚз§°пјҢеҰӮжһңжІЎжңүиҝҷдёӘйҳҹеҲ—еҲҷеҲӣе»әиҝҷдёӘйҳҹеҲ—пјҢжңүеҲҷдёҚдјҡеҲӣе»әгҖӮ
                durableпјҡжҳҜеҗҰжҢҒд№…еҢ–пјҢеҪ“mqйҮҚеҗҜд№ӢеҗҺжҳҜеҗҰиҝҳжңүж¶ҲжҒҜгҖӮ
                exclusiveпјҡжҳҜеҗҰзӢ¬еҚ пјҢеҸӘиғҪжңүдёҖдёӘж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…зӣ‘еҗ¬иҝҷйҳҹеҲ—пјҢеҪ“connectionе…ій—ӯж—¶пјҢжҳҜеҗҰеҲ йҷӨйҳҹеҲ—гҖӮ
                autoDeleteпјҡжҳҜеҗҰиҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨпјҢи®©жІЎжңүconsumerж—¶пјҢиҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨжҺүгҖӮ
                argumentsпјҡеҸӮж•°гҖӮ
      */
        //еҸ‘йҖҒж¶ҲжҒҜ
        String body = "hell rabbitMQ";
        channel.basicPublish("", "helloworld", null, body.getBytes());
      /*	еҸӮж•°пјҡ
      exchangeпјҡдәӨжҚўжңәеҗҚз§°пјҢз®ҖеҚ•жЁЎејҸдёӢдәӨжҚўжңәдјҡдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®Өзҡ„ вҖҳвҖҷ вҖҷвҖҳгҖӮ
			routingKeyпјҡи·Ҝз”ұеҗҚз§°пјҢдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨдәӨжҚўжңәзҡ„иҜқи·Ҝз”ұеҗҚз§°иҰҒе’ҢйҳҹеҲ—еҗҚз§°дёҖиҮҙгҖӮ
			propsпјҡй…ҚзҪ®дҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ
			bodyпјҡеҸ‘йҖҒзҡ„ж¶ҲжҒҜж•°жҚ®гҖӮ
      */
        //е…ій—ӯ
        channel.close();
        connection.close();
    }
}

ж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…

package com.xiaoyu.test1;

import com.rabbitmq.client.*;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException;

public class Con_HelloWorld {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException, TimeoutException {
        //еҲӣе»әиҝһжҺҘе·ҘеҺӮ
        ConnectionFactory factory = new ConnectionFactory();
        factory.setHost("47.115.50.193");
        factory.setPort(5672);
        factory.setVirtualHost("/");
        factory.setUsername("admin");
        factory.setPassword("admin");
        //еҲӣе»әиҝһжҺҘ
        Connection connection = factory.newConnection();
        //еҲӣе»әз®ЎйҒ“
        Channel channel = connection.createChannel();
        //й…ҚзҪ®дҝЎжҒҜ
        channel.queueDeclare("hello_world1", true, false, false, null);
        //ж¶ҲжҒҜжҺҘж”¶еҲ°ж—¶иҮӘеҠЁжү§иЎҢиҜҘж–№жі•
        Consumer consumer = new DefaultConsumer(channel) {
            @Override
            public void handleDelivery(String consumerTag, Envelope envelope, AMQP.BasicProperties properties, byte[] body) throws IOException {
                System.out.println("consumerTagж ҮиҜҶ:" + consumerTag);
                System.out.println("Exchangeз®ЎйҒ“:" + envelope.getExchange());
                System.out.println("RoutingKeyи·Ҝз”ұkey:" + envelope.getRoutingKey());
                System.out.println("propertiesеұһжҖ§:" + properties);
                System.out.println("bodyж¶ҲжҒҜ:" + new String(body));
            }
        };
        //и®ҫзҪ®жҺҘеҸ—йӮЈдёӘз®ЎйҒ“
        channel.basicConsume("hello_world1", true, consumer);
    }
}

  • Work queuesе·ҘдҪңйҳҹеҲ—жЁЎејҸ

  • дёҖеҜ№еӨҡпјҢдёҖдёӘз”ҹдә§иҖ…еӨҡдёӘж¶Ҳиҙ№иҖ…гҖӮ

  • е·ҘдҪңжЁЎејҸдёҚйңҖиҰҒеҲӣе»әдәӨжҚўжңәпјҢдҪҶжҳҜжңүдәӨжҚўжңәпјҢжҳҜдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨдәӨжҚўжңәгҖӮ

з”ҹдә§иҖ…

item.title: Shiro
item.description:
еҹәжң¬жЎҶжһ¶жҗӯе»әпјҡ

  • еҲӣе»әUserRealm.java

    • з»§жүҝAuthorizingRealm

      • е®һзҺ°AuthorizationInfo()пјҡжҺҲжқғж–№жі•гҖӮ

      • е®һзҺ°AuthenticationInfo()пјҡи®ӨиҜҒж–№жі•гҖӮ

  • еҲӣе»әShiroConfig.javaй…ҚзҪ®зұ»

    • @beanеҠ иҪҪUserRealm()пјҡеҠ иҪҪUserRealm.javaеҲ°SpringгҖӮ

    • @beanеҠ иҪҪDefaultWebSecurityManager()пјҡshiroз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁгҖӮ

    • @beanеҠ иҪҪShiroFilterFactoryBean()пјҡshiroиҝҮж»ӨеҷЁгҖӮ

    • ж №жҚ®йңҖиҰҒеҸҜеҠ иҪҪзҡ„ж–№жі•пјҡ

    • ShiroDialect()пјҡз”ЁжқҘж•ҙеҗҲshiro thymeleafгҖӮ

    • HashedCredentialsMatcher()пјҡи®ҫзҪ®еҠ еҜҶгҖӮ

    • EhCacheManager()пјҡзј“еӯҳгҖӮ

    • DefaultWebSessionManager()пјҡи®ҫзҪ®sessionз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁгҖӮ

UserRealm.javaе…·дҪ“ж–№жі•е®һзҺ°

жҺҲжқғж–№жі•пјҡ

@Override
protected AuthorizationInfo doGetAuthorizationInfo(PrincipalCollection principalCollection) {
SimpleAuthorizationInfo info = new SimpleAuthorizationInfo();
Subject subject = SecurityUtils.getSubject();
Users users = (Users)subject.getPrincipal();
info.addStringPermission(users.getPerms());
return info;
}

  • SimpleAuthorizationInfo info = new SimpleAuthorizationInfo();жҺҲжқғж–№жі•гҖӮ

  • Subject subject = SecurityUtils.getSubject();иҺ·еҸ–subjectгҖӮ

  • Users users = (Users)subject.getPrincipal();йҖҡиҝҮsubjectиҺ·еҸ–еҲ°еҪ“еүҚз”ЁжҲ·гҖӮ

  • usersжҳҜз”ұAuthenticationInfo()и®ӨиҜҒж–№жі•зҡ„SimpleAuthenticationInfoйҖҡиҝҮеҸӮж•°дј е…ҘгҖӮ

  • info.addStringPermission(users.getPerms());ж №жҚ®з”ЁжҲ·жқғйҷҗж·»еҠ жқғйҷҗгҖӮ

  • return infoеҚіеҸҜ

и®ӨиҜҒж–№жі•пјҡ

@Autowired
UserServiceImpl userService;
@Override
protected AuthenticationInfo doGetAuthenticationInfo(AuthenticationToken token) throws AuthenticationException {
UsernamePasswordToken upToken = (UsernamePasswordToken) token;
Users users = userService.queryUserByName(upToken.getUsername());
if (users == null) {
return null;
}
Subject subject = SecurityUtils.getSubject();
Session session = subject.getSession();
session.setAttribute("loginuser",users);
//ByteSource.Util.bytes(users.getSalt()):е‘ҠиҜүshiroеҠ зӣҗзҡ„зӣҗеҖј
if (users.getSalt() != null){//еҝ…йЎ»еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰжңүзӣҗеҖјдёҚз„¶дјҡжҠҘй”ҷпјҡnull
return new SimpleAuthenticationInfo(users,users.getPassword(),ByteSource.Util.bytes(users.getSalt()),"");
}
return new SimpleAuthenticationInfo(users,users.getPassword(),"");
}

  • UsernamePasswordToken upToken = (UsernamePasswordToken) token;иҺ·еҸ–иҙҰеҸ·еҜҶз Ғд»ӨзүҢ

  • @autoWiredеұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘUserServiceImpl

  • Users users = userService.queryUserByName(upToken.getUsername())пјӣ

  • upToken.getUsername()пјҡиҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚз”ЁжҲ·еҗҚз§°гҖӮ

  • userService.queryUserByNameпјҡжҹҘиҜўиҜҘз”ЁжҲ·пјҢе№¶иҝ”еӣһгҖӮ

  • еҲӨж–ӯusersжҳҜеҗҰдёәз©әпјҢеҰӮжһңдёәз©әиҝ”еӣһnullгҖӮshiroдјҡиҮӘеҠЁжҠҘй”ҷпјҡжІЎжңүз”ЁжҲ·й”ҷиҜҜгҖӮ

  • Subject subject = SecurityUtils.getSubject();иҺ·еҸ–subjectгҖӮ

  • Session session = subject.getSession();иҺ·еҸ–sessionгҖӮ

  • session.setAttribute(“loginuser”,users);жҠҠз”ЁжҲ·дҝЎжҒҜдј е…Ҙsessionж–№дҫҝеҗҺиҫ№дҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ

  • users.getSalt() != null;еҲӨж–ӯиҜҘз”ЁжҲ·жҳҜеҗҰжңүеҠ зӣҗгҖӮ

  • дёҚзӯүдәҺnullд»ЈиЎЁеҠ зӣҗпјҢйңҖиҰҒиҝ”еӣһзӣҗеҖјгҖӮ

  • return new SimpleAuthenticationInfo(users,users.getPassword(),ByteSource.Util.bytes(users.getSalt()),"");

  • з¬¬дёҖдёӘеҸӮж•°дёәдј йҖ’иҜҘз”ЁжҲ·зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜ

  • з¬¬дәҢдёӘеҸӮж•°пјҡusers.getPassword()пјҡдј е…ҘеҜҶз Ғз”ұshiroжқҘеҲӨж–ӯеҜҶз ҒжҳҜеҗҰжӯЈзЎ®гҖӮ

  • з¬¬дёүдёӘеҸӮж•°пјҡByteSource.Util.bytes(users.getSalt())пјҡдј е…ҘзӣҗеҖј

  • з¬¬еӣӣдёӘеҸӮж•°пјҡеҪ“еүҚзҡ„realmеҗҚз§°

  • зӯүдәҺnullд»ЈиЎЁжІЎжңүеҠ зӣҗпјҢдёҚйңҖиҰҒиҝ”еӣһзӣҗеҖјгҖӮ

  • return new SimpleAuthenticationInfo(users,users.getPassword(),"");

Controller.java

@RequestMapping("/login")
  public ModelAndView log(String username,String password,boolean rememberme){
      ModelAndView modelAndView = new ModelAndView();
      //иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚз”ЁжҲ·
      Subject subject = SecurityUtils.getSubject();
      //е°ҒиЈ…з”ЁжҲ·зҡ„зҷ»еҪ•ж•°жҚ®
      UsernamePasswordToken token = new UsernamePasswordToken(username, password);
      try {
          subject.login(token);//жү§иЎҢзҷ»еҪ•ж–№жі•пјҢеҰӮжһңжІЎжңүејӮеёёе°ұok
          token.setRememberMe(rememberme);
          modelAndView.setViewName("/index");
      } catch (UnknownAccountException e) {//з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚдёҚеӯҳеңЁејӮеёё
          modelAndView.addObject("msgUP","з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚдёҚеӯҳеңЁжҲ–иҖ…й”ҷиҜҜ");
          modelAndView.setViewName("/login");
          System.out.println(e);
      } catch (IncorrectCredentialsException e) {//еҜҶз ҒдёҚеӯҳеңЁ
          modelAndView.addObject("msgUP","еҜҶз ҒдёҚеӯҳеңЁ");
          modelAndView.setViewName("/login");
          System.out.println(e);
      }
      return modelAndView;
  }

зҷ»еҪ•иҝҮзЁӢ

  • зҷ»еҪ•йЎөйқўеЎ«еҶҷиҙҰеҸ·еҜҶз Ғ.

  • дј е…ҘеҲ°еҜ№еә”зҡ„жҳ е°„ж–№жі•.

  • ж–№жі•и°ғз”Ёsubject.login(token)иҝӣиЎҢзҷ»еҪ•.

  • и·іиҪ¬еҲ°и®ӨиҜҒж–№жі•ж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢиҙҰеҸ·еҜҶз ҒеҲӨж–ӯ.

  • еҲӨж–ӯд№ӢеҗҺиҝ”еӣһеҲ°жҳ е°„ж–№жі•.

  • жҳ е°„ж–№жі•ж №жҚ®иҝ”еӣһз»“жһңиҝӣиЎҢеҜ№еә”йҖ»иҫ‘.

ShiroConfig.javaй…ҚзҪ®зұ»

UserRealm()пјҡUserRealmж–№жі•

@Bean
public UserRealm userRealm(@Qualifier("hashedCredentialsMatcher")HashedCredentialsMatcher hashedCredentialsMatcher) {
UserRealm userRealm = new UserRealm();
userRealm.setCredentialsMatcher(hashedCredentialsMatcher);//ж·»еҠ еҜҶз Ғи®ҫзҪ®гҖӮ
return userRealm;
}

иҜҘж–№жі•зҡ„дё»иҰҒдҪңз”Ёе°ұжҳҜжҠҠUserRealm.javaзұ»еҠ иҪҪеҲ°Springе®№еҷЁ

DefaultWebSecurityManager()пјҡshiroе®үе…Ёз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁж–№жі•

@Bean()
public DefaultWebSecurityManager getDefaultWebSecurityManager(
@Qualifier("userRealm") UserRealm userRealm,
@Qualifier("ehCacheManager")EhCacheManager ehCacheManager,
@Qualifier("defaultWebSessionManager")DefaultWebSessionManager defaultWebSessionManager,
@Qualifier("cookieRememberMeManager")CookieRememberMeManager meManager) {
DefaultWebSecurityManager securityManager = new DefaultWebSecurityManager();
//е…іиҒ”userRealm
securityManager.setRealm(userRealm);
//ж·»еҠ з¬¬дёүж–№зј“еӯҳ
securityManager.setCacheManager(ehCacheManager);
//ж·»еҠ и®ҫзҪ®зҡ„sessionManager
securityManager.setSessionManager(defaultWebSessionManager);
//ж·»еҠ cookieз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁ
securityManager.setRememberMeManager(meManager);
return securityManager;
}

иҜҘж–№жі•дҪңз”Ёдёәпјҡ

  • ж·»еҠ е…іиҒ”userRealm

  • ж·»еҠ з¬¬дёүж–№зј“еӯҳз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁ

  • ж·»еҠ иҮӘе®ҡд№үи®ҫзҪ®зҡ„sessionз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁ

ShiroFilterFactoryBean()пјҡshiroжқғйҷҗиҝҮж»ӨеҷЁж–№жі•

@Bean
public ShiroFilterFactoryBean shiroFilterFactoryBean(@Qualifier("getDefaultWebSecurityManager") DefaultWebSecurityManager defa) {

ShiroFilterFactoryBean bean = new ShiroFilterFactoryBean();
//и®ҫзҪ®е®үе…Ёз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁ
bean.setSecurityManager(defa);
//ж·»еҠ shiroзҡ„еҶ…зҪ®иҝҮж»ӨеҷЁ
/* shiroе·Із»Ҹе®ҡд№үзҡ„е…ій”®еӯ—
          anon:ж— йңҖи®ӨиҜҒе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҝй—®
          authcпјҡеҝ…йЎ»и®ӨиҜҒжүҚиғҪи®ҝй—®
          userпјҡеҝ…йЎ»жӢҘжңүи®°дҪҸжҲ‘еҠҹиғҪжүҚиғҪи®ҝй—®
          permsпјҡжӢҘжңүеҜ№жҹҗдёӘиө„жәҗзҡ„жқғйҷҗжүҚиғҪи®ҝй—®
          logout:йҖҖеҮәеҪ“еүҚзҷ»еҪ•
   */
//и®ҫзҪ®и®ҝй—®жӢҰжҲӘ
LinkedHashMap<String, String> hashMap = new LinkedHashMap<>();
//жҺҲжқғ
hashMap.put("/user/add","perms[user:add]");
hashMap.put("/user/update","perms[user:update]");
//жҺҲжқғиҰҒеңЁи®ӨиҜҒеүҚиҫ№
hashMap.put("/user/*", "authc");
//йҖҖеҮәзҷ»еҪ•,/logoutдёҚйңҖиҰҒе…·дҪ“зҡ„жҳ е°„ж–№жі•пјҢеҸӘиҰҒи·іиҪ¬еҲ°иҝҷдёӘи·Ҝеҫ„е°ұйҖҖеҮәгҖӮ
hashMap.put("/logout","logout");
bean.setFilterChainDefinitionMap(hashMap);
//и®ҫзҪ®зҷ»еҪ•йЎөйқў
bean.setLoginUrl("/toLogin");
//и®ҫзҪ®жңӘжҺҲжқғиҜ·жұӮ
bean.setUnauthorizedUrl("/unauthorized");
bean.setSuccessUrl("/toLogin");
return bean;
}

е®үе…Ёз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁйңҖиҰҒж·»еҠ еҲ°иҜҘbeanпјҡ bean.setSecurityManager(defa);

жҺҲжқғmapйӣҶеҗҲзҡ„keyдёәиө„жәҗпјҢvalueдёәи®ҝй—®иҝҷдәӣиө„жәҗиҰҒжҗәеёҰзҡ„жқғйҷҗеӯ—з¬ҰдёІгҖӮ

йҖҖеҮәзҷ»еҪ•зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„еҸӘйңҖиҰҒе’ҢеүҚз«Ҝзҡ„йҖҖеҮәжҢүй’®дёҠзҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„дёҖж ·еҚіеҸҜпјҢдёҚйңҖиҰҒе…·дҪ“зҡ„жҳ е°„е®һзҺ°ж–№жі•гҖӮ

жңӘжҺҲжқғиҜ·жұӮе°ұжҳҜеҪ“иҜҘз”ЁжҲ·жІЎжңүиҜҘжқғйҷҗж—¶и®ҝй—®иҜҘиө„жәҗе°ұдјҡи·іиҪ¬еҲ°иҝҷдёӘи·Ҝеҫ„зҡ„еүҚз«ҜйЎөйқўдёҠпјҢиҝҷдёӘйңҖиҰҒжҳ е°„ж–№жі•зҡ„е®һзҺ°жқҘиҝӣиЎҢи·іиҪ¬

жҺҲжқғе’Ңи®ӨиҜҒзҡ„еҢәеҲ«пјҡ

и®ӨиҜҒе°ұжҳҜеҝ…йЎ»иҰҒзҷ»еҪ•иҙҰеҸ·жүҚеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҝй—®

жҺҲжқғж—¶еҝ…йЎ»иҰҒз”ЁжҲ·зҷ»еҪ•е№¶жҗәеёҰиҜҘжқғйҷҗжүҚеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҝй—®

ShiroDialect()пјҡз”ЁжқҘж•ҙеҗҲshiro thymeleafж–№жі•

@Bean
public ShiroDialect shiroDialect(){
return new ShiroDialect();
}

<h1>йҰ–йЎө</h1>
<!--    th:if="${session.loginuser!=null}"еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰжңүиҝҷдёӘsessionеҖј-->
<h2 th:if="${session.loginuser!=null}"><a href="/logout">йҖҖеҮә</a></h2>
<h2 th:if="${session.loginuser==null}"><a href="/toLogin">зҷ»еҪ•</a></h2>
<p th:text="${msg}"></p>
<!--    shiro:hasPermission="user:add"жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰжңүиҝҷдёӘжқғйҷҗ-->
<div shiro:hasPermission="user:add">
<a th:href="@{/user/add}">add</a>
</div>
<div shiro:hasPermission="user:update">
<a th:href="@{/user/update}">update</a>
</div>

<!--    thymeleafе’Ңshiroзҡ„еҗҚз§°з©әй—ҙ-->
xmlns:th="http://www.thymeleaf.org"
xmlns:shiro="http://www.pollix.at/thymeleaf/shiro"

<!--   pom.xmlеқҗж Ү     -->
<dependency>
<groupId>com.github.theborakompanioni</groupId>
<artifactId>thymeleaf-extras-shiro</artifactId>
<version>2.0.0</version>
</dependency>

HashedCredentialsMatcher()пјҡи®ҫзҪ®еҠ еҜҶж–№жі•

@Bean(name = "hashedCredentialsMatcher")
public HashedCredentialsMatcher shiro(){
HashedCredentialsMatcher credentialsMatcher = new HashedCredentialsMatcher();
//еҠ еҜҶж–№ејҸ
credentialsMatcher.setHashAlgorithmName("md5");
//ж•ЈеҲ—ж¬Ўж•°пјҢж¬Ўж•°ж•ҙдёӘйЎ№зӣ®иҰҒз»ҹдёҖдёҚз„¶дјҡжҠҘй”ҷ
credentialsMatcher.setHashIterations(1);
return credentialsMatcher;
}

@RequestMapping("/adduser")
@ResponseBody
public String md5(String username,String password){
//еңЁжіЁеҶҢжҳҜеҜ№еҜҶз ҒиҝӣиЎҢеҠ еҜҶ
Md5Hash md5Hash = new Md5Hash(password);
//еҠ зӣҗеҠ еҜҶ
int num = new Random().nextInt(90000)+10000;
Md5Hash md5Hash1 = new Md5Hash(password, num+"");
//еҠ зӣҗеҠ еҜҶеҠ ж•ЈеҲ—
val md5Hash2 = new Md5Hash(password, num + "", 3);
//з¬¬дәҢз§Қж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢеҠ еҜҶ,е’ҢMd5HashдёҖж ·жҳҜйҮҚиҪҪеҪўејҸзҡ„
final SimpleHash md5 = new SimpleHash("md5", password, num + "", 3);
return "еҸӘеҠ еҜҶ"+md5Hash.toString()+"<br>"
+"еҠ зӣҗеҠ еҜҶпјҡ"+md5Hash1.toString()+"зӣҗеҖјпјҡ"+num+"<br>"
+"еҠ зӣҗеҠ еҜҶеҠ ж•ЈеҲ—"+md5Hash2.toString()+"зӣҗеҖјпјҡ"+num+"<br>"
+"SimpleHashеҠ еҜҶ"+md5.toString()+"зӣҗеҖјпјҡ"+num;
}

иҝҷдёӨдёӘзҡ„ж•ЈеҲ—ж¬Ўж•°иҰҒдёҖиҮҙгҖӮ

ж•ЈеҲ—дёҚдёҖе®ҡиҰҒйҡҸжңәж•°еӯ—пјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢжҲ–иҖ…з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚз§°пјҢжҲ–иҖ…иҮӘе®ҡд№үгҖӮ

shiroй»ҳи®Өзҡ„еҠ зӣҗжҳҜеҠ еңЁеҜҶз ҒеүҚиҫ№пјҢиҝҷдёӘеҸҜд»ҘиҮӘе®ҡд№үе®һзҺ°гҖӮ

еҠ зӣҗеҝ…йЎ»жҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІеҪўејҸдёҚз„¶дјҡжҠҘй”ҷгҖӮ

EhCacheManager()пјҡзј“еӯҳж–№жі•

@Bean
public EhCacheManager ehCacheManager(){
EhCacheManager ehCacheManager = new EhCacheManager();
ehCacheManager.setCacheManagerConfigFile("classpath:ehcache.xml");
return ehCacheManager;
}

<dependency>
<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-cache</artifactId>
</dependency>
<dependency>
<groupId>net.sf.ehcache</groupId>
<artifactId>ehcache</artifactId>
</dependency>
<dependency>
<groupId>org.apache.shiro</groupId>
<artifactId>shiro-ehcache</artifactId>
<version>1.7.1</version>
</dependency>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ehcache updateCheck="false" dynamicConfig="false">
<diskStore path=""/>
<cache name="user" maxEntriesLocalHeap="1000"/>
<defaultCache
      name="defaultCache"
      maxElementsInMemory="1000"
      maxElementsOnDisk="10000000"
      eternal="false"
      overflowToDisk="false"
      diskPersistent="false"
      timeToIdleSeconds="120"
      timeToLiveSeconds="120"
      diskExpiryThreadIntervalSeconds="120"
      memoryStoreEvictionPolicy="LRU"
/>
</ehcache>

з¬¬дёҖжӯҘеҜје…Ҙеқҗж ҮгҖӮ

item.title: Java Swagger
item.description:
и®ҝй—®ең°еқҖ

http://localhost:8080/swagger-ui/

<dependency>
    <groupId>io.springfox</groupId>
    <artifactId>springfox-boot-starter</artifactId>
    <version>3.0.0</version>
</dependency>

@EnableOpenApi
@Configuration
public class Swagger3Config {

    @Bean
    public Docket createRestApi() {
        return new Docket(DocumentationType.OAS_30)
                .pathMapping("/")
                // е®ҡд№үжҳҜеҗҰејҖеҗҜswaggerпјҢfalseдёәе…ій—ӯпјҢеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮеҸҳйҮҸжҺ§еҲ¶
                .enable(true)
                // е°Ҷapiзҡ„е…ғдҝЎжҒҜи®ҫзҪ®дёәеҢ…еҗ«еңЁjson ResourceListingе“Қеә”дёӯгҖӮ
                .apiInfo(apiInfo())
                // жҺҘеҸЈи°ғиҜ•ең°еқҖ
                .host("http://localhost:8080")
                // йҖүжӢ©е“ӘдәӣжҺҘеҸЈдҪңдёәswaggerзҡ„docеҸ‘еёғ
                .select()
                .apis(RequestHandlerSelectors.basePackage("com.xiaoyu.controller"))
                .paths(PathSelectors.any())
                .build();
    }

    /** API йЎөйқўдёҠеҚҠйғЁеҲҶеұ•зӨәдҝЎжҒҜ */
    private ApiInfo apiInfo() {
        return new ApiInfoBuilder()
                .title("Swagger3Demo")
                .description("дёҖж¬Ўз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„Demo")
                .contact(new Contact("loveYu233", "xxxxxxx", "1958387321@qq.com"))
                .version("1.0")
                .build();
    }
}

@RestController
@Api(tags = "1.UserжөӢиҜ•зұ»жҺҘеҸЈ")
public class Test {

    @ApiOperation("getжөӢиҜ•иҝ”еӣһUserJsonеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ")
    @GetMapping("/getUser")
    public String t1() {
        User user = new User("1", "zhangsan", "qwer");
        return JSON.toJSON(user).toString();
    }

    @ApiOperation("postжөӢиҜ•иҝ”еӣһUserJsonеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ")
    @PostMapping("/postUser")
    public String t2() {
        User user = new User("1", "zhangsan", "qwer");
        return JSON.toJSON(user).toString();
    }
}

item.title: springBootж“ҚдҪңES
item.description:
SpringBootж“ҚдҪңES

еҜје…Ҙдҫқиө–пјҡESдҫқиө–е’ҢйҳҝйҮҢjsonдҫқиө–

<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-elasticsearch</artifactId>
</dependency>

<dependency>
  <groupId>com.alibaba</groupId>
  <artifactId>fastjson</artifactId>
  <version>1.2.75</version>
</dependency>

й…ҚзҪ®bean

дёҚй…ҚзҪ®д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘпјҢдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®Өзҡ„

@Configuration()
public class EsConfig {
    @Bean
    public RestHighLevelClient restHighLevelClient() {
        return new RestHighLevelClient(
                RestClient.builder(
                        new HttpHost("localhost", 9200, "http")));
    }
}

е®һзҺ°еўһеҲ ж”№жҹҘ

@Autowired
private RestHighLevelClient client;

еҲӣе»әзҙўеј•

@Test
void t1() throws IOException {
  CreateIndexRequest request = new CreateIndexRequest("hzy_index");
  CreateIndexResponse response = client.indices().create(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
  System.out.println(response);
}

еҲӨж–ӯзҙўеј•жҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁ

@Test
void t2() throws IOException {
    GetIndexRequest request = new GetIndexRequest("hzy_index");
    boolean exists = client.indices().exists(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println(exists);
}

еҲ йҷӨзҙўеј•

@Test
void t3() throws IOException {
    DeleteIndexRequest request = new DeleteIndexRequest("hzy_index");
    AcknowledgedResponse response = client.indices().delete(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println(response.isAcknowledged());
}

ж·»еҠ ж–ҮжЎЈ

@Test
void t4() throws IOException {
    User user = new User("зӢӮзҘһиҜҙ", 12);
    IndexRequest request = new IndexRequest("hzy_index");
    request.id("1").timeout("1s").source(JSON.toJSONString(user), XContentType.JSON);
    IndexResponse response = client.index(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println("иҝ”еӣһж¶ҲжҒҜпјҡ" + response.toString());
    System.out.println("зҠ¶жҖҒпјҡ" + response.status());
}

иҺ·еҸ–ж–ҮжЎЈ

@Test
void t5() throws IOException {
  GetRequest request = new GetRequest("hzy_index", "1");
  //        дёҚиҺ·еҸ–иҝ”еӣһзҡ„ _sourceзҡ„дёҠдёӢж–Ү
  request.fetchSourceContext(new FetchSourceContext(false));
  request.storedFields("_none_");
  //        иҺ·еҸ–ж–ҮжЎЈжҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁ
  boolean exists = client.exists(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
  System.out.println(exists);
}

иҺ·еҸ–ж–ҮжЎЈдҝЎжҒҜ

@Test
void t6() throws IOException {
    GetRequest request = new GetRequest("hzy_index", "1");
    GetResponse response = client.get(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println(response.getSourceAsString());
    System.out.println(response);
}

жӣҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈ

@Test
void t7() throws IOException {
    UpdateRequest request = new UpdateRequest("hzy_index", "1");
    User user = new User("зӢӮзҘһиҜҙ", 22);
    request.timeout("1s").doc(JSON.toJSONString(user), XContentType.JSON);
    UpdateResponse response = client.update(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println(response);
    System.out.println(response.status());
}

еҲ йҷӨж–ҮжЎЈ

@Test
void t8() throws IOException {
    DeleteRequest request = new DeleteRequest("hzy_index", "1");
    request.timeout("1s");
    DeleteResponse response = client.delete(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println(response);
    System.out.println(response.status());
}

жү№йҮҸжҸ’е…Ҙ

@Test
void t9() throws IOException {
    BulkRequest bulkRequest = new BulkRequest();
    ArrayList<User> users = new ArrayList<>();
    users.add(new User("a", 1));
    users.add(new User("b", 2));
    users.add(new User("c", 3));
    users.add(new User("d", 4));
    users.add(new User("e", 5));
    users.add(new User("apple", 6));
    users.add(new User("app", 7));
    users.add(new User("ai", 8));
    bulkRequest.timeout("6s");
    for (int i = 0; i < users.size(); i++) {
        bulkRequest.add(new IndexRequest("hzy_index")
                .id("" + i + 1)
                .source(JSON.toJSONString(users.get(i)), XContentType.JSON));
    }
    BulkResponse response = client.bulk(bulkRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println(response);
    System.out.println(response.hasFailures()); //жҳҜеҗҰеӨұиҙҘ
}

жҗңзҙўе’Ңй«ҳдә®

@Test
void t10() throws IOException {
    SearchRequest request = new SearchRequest("biandata");
    SearchSourceBuilder builder = new SearchSourceBuilder();
    MatchQueryBuilder query = QueryBuilders.matchQuery("title", "зҷҪиӣҮ");
    builder.query(query).timeout(new TimeValue(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS));

    HighlightBuilder highlightBuilder = new HighlightBuilder();
    highlightBuilder.field("title")
            .requireFieldMatch(false)
            .preTags("<p style='color:red'>")
            .postTags("</p>");
    builder.highlighter(highlightBuilder);

    request.source(builder);
    SearchResponse search = client.search(request, RequestOptions.DEFAULT);
    System.out.println(JSON.toJSONString(search.getHits()));
    System.out.println("=========================");
    for (SearchHit hit : search.getHits().getHits()) {
        Map<String, HighlightField> highlightFields = hit.getHighlightFields();
        HighlightField name = highlightFields.get("title");
        Map<String, Object> sourceAsMap = hit.getSourceAsMap();
        if (name != null) {
            Text[] fragments = name.fragments();
            for (Text fragment : fragments) {
                sourceAsMap.put("title",fragment);
            }
        }
        System.out.println(sourceAsMap);
    }
}

item.title: ESиҜҰз»ҶдҪҝз”Ё
item.description:
Value Count - зұ»дјјsqlзҡ„countеҮҪж•°пјҢз»ҹи®ЎжҖ»ж•°
Cardinality - зұ»дјјSQLзҡ„count(DISTINCT еӯ—ж®ө)пјҢ з»ҹи®ЎдёҚйҮҚеӨҚзҡ„ж•°жҚ®жҖ»ж•°
Avg - жұӮе№іеқҮеҖј
Sum - жұӮе’Ң
Max - жұӮжңҖеӨ§еҖј
Min - жұӮжңҖе°ҸеҖј


TermsиҒҡеҗҲ - зұ»дјјSQLзҡ„group byпјҢж №жҚ®еӯ—ж®өе”ҜдёҖеҖјеҲҶз»„
HistogramиҒҡеҗҲ - ж №жҚ®ж•°еҖјй—ҙйҡ”еҲҶз»„пјҢдҫӢеҰӮ: д»·ж јжҢү100й—ҙйҡ”еҲҶз»„пјҢ0гҖҒ100гҖҒ200гҖҒ300зӯүзӯү
Date histogramиҒҡеҗҲ - ж №жҚ®ж—¶й—ҙй—ҙйҡ”еҲҶз»„пјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡжҢүжңҲгҖҒжҢүеӨ©гҖҒжҢүе°Ҹж—¶еҲҶз»„
RangeиҒҡеҗҲ - жҢүж•°еҖјиҢғеӣҙеҲҶз»„пјҢдҫӢеҰӮ: 0-150дёҖз»„пјҢ150-200дёҖз»„пјҢ200-500дёҖз»„гҖӮ

POST /sales/_search?size=0
{
    "aggs" : {
        "prices" : { // иҒҡеҗҲжҹҘиҜўеҗҚеӯ—пјҢйҡҸдҫҝеҸ–дёҖдёӘ
            "histogram" : { // иҒҡеҗҲзұ»еһӢдёәпјҡhistogram
                "field" : "price", // ж №жҚ®priceеӯ—ж®өеҲҶжЎ¶
                "interval" : 50 // еҲҶжЎ¶зҡ„й—ҙйҡ”дёә50пјҢж„ҸжҖқе°ұжҳҜpriceеӯ—ж®өеҖјжҢү50й—ҙйҡ”еҲҶз»„
            }
        }
    }
}

POST /sales/_search?size=0
{
    "aggs" : {
        "sales_over_time" : { // иҒҡеҗҲжҹҘиҜўеҗҚеӯ—пјҢйҡҸдҫҝеҸ–дёҖдёӘ
            "date_histogram" : { // иҒҡеҗҲзұ»еһӢдёә: date_histogram
                "field" : "date", // ж №жҚ®dateеӯ—ж®өеҲҶз»„
                "calendar_interval" : "month", // еҲҶз»„й—ҙйҡ”пјҡmonthд»ЈиЎЁжҜҸжңҲгҖҒж”ҜжҢҒminuteпјҲжҜҸеҲҶй’ҹпјүгҖҒhourпјҲжҜҸе°Ҹж—¶пјүгҖҒdayпјҲжҜҸеӨ©пјүгҖҒweekпјҲжҜҸе‘ЁпјүгҖҒyearпјҲжҜҸе№ҙпјү
                "format" : "yyyy-MM-dd" // и®ҫзҪ®иҝ”еӣһз»“жһңдёӯжЎ¶keyзҡ„ж—¶й—ҙж јејҸ
            }
        }
    }
}

GET /_search
{
    "aggs" : {
        "price_ranges" : {
            "range" : {
                "field" : "price",
                "keyed" : true,
                "ranges" : [
                    // йҖҡиҝҮkeyеҸӮж•°пјҢй…ҚзҪ®жҜҸдёҖдёӘеҲҶжЎ¶зҡ„еҗҚеӯ—
                    { "key" : "cheap", "to" : 100 },
                    { "key" : "average", "from" : 100, "to" : 200 },
                    { "key" : "expensive", "from" : 200 }
                ]
            }
        }
    }
}

иҒҡеҗҲеҗҺжҺ’еәҸ

_count - жҢүж–ҮжЎЈж•°жҺ’еәҸгҖӮеҜ№ terms гҖҒ histogram гҖҒ date_histogram жңүж•Ҳ _term - жҢүиҜҚйЎ№зҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІеҖјзҡ„еӯ—жҜҚйЎәеәҸжҺ’еәҸгҖӮеҸӘеңЁ terms еҶ…дҪҝз”Ё _key - жҢүжҜҸдёӘжЎ¶зҡ„й”®еҖјж•°еҖјжҺ’еәҸ, д»…еҜ№ histogram е’Ң date_histogram жңүж•Ҳ

item.title: ESе®үиЈ…дҪҝз”Ё
item.description:
е®үиЈ…дҪҝз”Ё

е®үиЈ…ElasticSearchпјҡ

https://www.elastic.co/cn/downloads/elasticsearch

и§ЈеҶіи·Ёеҹҹй—®йўҳ

еңЁconfigзҡ„elasticsearch.ymlдёӯж·»еҠ 

http.cors.enabled: "true"
http.cors.allow-origin: "*"

е®үиЈ…elasticsearch-headжҸ’д»¶пјҡ

https://github.com/mobz/elasticsearch-head

  • git clone git://github.com/mobz/elasticsearch-head.git
  • cd elasticsearch-head
  • npm install
  • npm run start
  • open http://localhost:9100/

е®үиЈ…kibana

https://www.elastic.co/cn/downloads/kibana

и®ҫзҪ®дёӯж–Ү

еңЁconfigж–Үд»¶зҡ„й…ҚзҪ®ymlдёӯж·»еҠ 

i18n.locale: "zh-CN"

дёӢиҪҪikеҲҶиҜҚеҷЁ

https://github.com/medcl/elasticsearch-analysis-ik/releases

и§ЈеҺӢеҲ°esзҡ„pluginsж–Үд»¶дёӯ

Elasticsearchпјҡйқўеҗ‘ж–ҮжЎЈ

дҪҝз”ЁrestжҢҮд»Өж“ҚдҪңes

дёӯж–ҮеҲҶиҜҚдҪҝз”Ёik

дёӢиҪҪи§ЈеҺӢеҲ°esзҡ„жҸ’д»¶зӣ®еҪ•еҚіеҸҜ

жңҖе°ҸзІ’еәҰ

GET _analyze
{
"analyzer": "ik_smart",
"text": "дёӯеӣҪе…ұдә§е…ҡ"
}

{
"tokens" : [
{
"token" : "дёӯеӣҪе…ұдә§е…ҡ",
"start_offset" : 0,
"end_offset" : 5,
"type" : "CN_WORD",
"position" : 0
}
]
}

жңҖз»ҶзІ’еәҰ

GET _analyze
{
"analyzer": "ik_max_word",
"text": "дёӯеӣҪе…ұдә§е…ҡ"
}

{
"tokens" : [
{
"token" : "дёӯеӣҪе…ұдә§е…ҡ",
"start_offset" : 0,
"end_offset" : 5,
"type" : "CN_WORD",
"position" : 0
},
{
"token" : "дёӯеӣҪ",
"start_offset" : 0,
"end_offset" : 2,
"type" : "CN_WORD",
"position" : 1
},
{
"token" : "еӣҪе…ұ",
"start_offset" : 1,
"end_offset" : 3,
"type" : "CN_WORD",
"position" : 2
},
{
"token" : "е…ұдә§е…ҡ",
"start_offset" : 2,
"end_offset" : 5,
"type" : "CN_WORD",
"position" : 3
},
{
"token" : "е…ұдә§",
"start_offset" : 2,
"end_offset" : 4,
"type" : "CN_WORD",
"position" : 4
},
{
"token" : "е…ҡ",
"start_offset" : 4,
"end_offset" : 5,
"type" : "CN_CHAR",
"position" : 5
}
]
}

иҮӘе®ҡд№үеҲҶиҜҚ

еңЁikзҡ„configйҮҢйқўеҲӣе»ә.dicз»“е°ҫзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҢйҮҢйқўеҶҷе…ҘйңҖиҰҒзҡ„иҜҚпјҢеңЁ.xmlйҮҢйқўж·»еҠ иҝҷдёӘ.dicж–Үд»¶пјҢйҮҚеҗҜesеҚіеҸҜ

иӢұж–ҮеҲҶиҜҚдҪҝз”ЁesиҮӘеёҰзҡ„

keywordпјҡеҪ“дҪңдёҖдёӘж•ҙдҪ“

item.title: SpringMVC
item.description:
жҰӮеҝөпјҡ

  • еүҚз«ҜжҺ§еҲ¶еҷЁ:DispatcherServletпјҡи°ғз”Ёе…¶д»–еҠҹиғҪз»„д»¶гҖӮ

  • еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁжҳ е°„еҷЁ:HandlerMappingпјҡең°еқҖи§Јжһҗиҝ”еӣһеҜ№еә”зҡ„жү§иЎҢй“ҫгҖӮ

  • еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁйҖӮй…ҚеҷЁ:HandlerAdapterпјҡиў«еүҚз«ҜиҜҘжҺ§еҲ¶еҷЁи°ғз”ЁпјҢжү§иЎҢи°ғз”ЁеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁгҖӮ

  • еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ:Handlerпјҡзү№жңүиЎҢдёәиҝӣиЎҢе°ҒиЈ…зҡ„з»„д»¶гҖӮ

  • и§Ҷеӣҫи§ЈжһҗеҷЁ:ViewResolverпјҡи§Јжһҗи§ҶеӣҫгҖӮ

  • и§Ҷеӣҫ:Viewпјҡи§ҶеӣҫдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ

еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁжҳ е°„еҷЁ:HandlerMappingпјҡең°еқҖи§Јжһҗиҝ”еӣһеҜ№еә”зҡ„жү§иЎҢй“ҫ

еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁйҖӮй…ҚеҷЁ:HandlerAdapterпјҡиў«еүҚз«ҜиҜҘжҺ§еҲ¶еҷЁи°ғз”ЁпјҢжү§иЎҢи°ғз”ЁеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ

и§Ҷеӣҫи§ЈжһҗеҷЁ:ViewResolverпјҡи§Јжһҗи§Ҷеӣҫ

з§°дёәmvcзҡ„дёүеӨ§з»„д»¶

йЎөйқўи·іиҪ¬

иҝ”еӣһеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ

    @RequestMapping("/quick")
    public String save(){
        return "redirect:/jsp/success.jsp";
    }

иҝ”еӣһжЁЎеһӢи§Ҷеӣҫ

//еҸҜд»Ҙиҝ”еӣһеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜж•ҙдёӘModelAndView
    @RequestMapping("/quick")
    public ModelAndView save2(){
        ModelAndView modelAndView = new ModelAndView();
//        и®ҫзҪ®и§Ҷеӣҫ
        modelAndView.setViewName("success");
//        и®ҫзҪ®жЁЎеһӢпјҲзӣёеҪ“дәҺеҗ‘еҹҹеҜ№иұЎж·»еҠ ж•°жҚ®jspйЎөйқўеҸҜд»ҘиҺ·еҸ–зҡ„пјүпјҢobjectзұ»еһӢдёҚеұҖйҷҗдәҺstring
        modelAndView.addObject("username","zhangsan");
        return modelAndView;
    }

//еҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘеңЁж–№жі•еҸӮж•°дёҺдёӯиҺ·еҸ–
    @RequestMapping("/quick")
    public ModelAndView save2(ModelAndView modelAndView){
//        и®ҫзҪ®и§Ҷеӣҫ
        modelAndView.setViewName("success");
//        и®ҫзҪ®жЁЎеһӢпјҲзӣёеҪ“дәҺеҗ‘еҹҹеҜ№иұЎж·»еҠ ж•°жҚ®jspйЎөйқўеҸҜд»ҘиҺ·еҸ–зҡ„пјүпјҢobjectзұ»еһӢдёҚеұҖйҷҗдәҺstring
        modelAndView.addObject("username","zhangsan");
        return modelAndView;
    }

//еҸҜд»ҘеҸӘиҺ·еҸ–modelпјҢдҪҶжҳҜиҝ”еӣһеҖјеҝ…йЎ»жҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
    @RequestMapping("/quick")
    public String save2(Model model){
//        и®ҫзҪ®жЁЎеһӢпјҲзӣёеҪ“дәҺеҗ‘еҹҹеҜ№иұЎж·»еҠ ж•°жҚ®jspйЎөйқўеҸҜд»ҘиҺ·еҸ–зҡ„пјүпјҢobjectзұ»еһӢдёҚеұҖйҷҗдәҺstring
        model.addAttribute("username","zhangsan");
        return "success";
    }
/*
и§ЈйҮҠпјҡ
    еҸӮж•°дёӯзҡ„ModelAndViewжҲ–иҖ…ModelеңЁиў«springMVCжү§иЎҢж—¶йғҪдјҡиҝӣиЎҢеұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘпјҢжүҖд»ҘеҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ
    еҸӮж•°д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜдёҖдәӣеёёз”Ёзҡ„еҜ№иұЎдҫӢеҰӮ
    requestгҖӮresponseгҖӮгҖӮ
*/

еҶ…йғЁи§Ҷеӣҫи§ЈжһҗеҷЁ

    <bean id="viewResolver" class="org.springframework.web.servlet.view.InternalResourceViewResolver">
        <property name="prefix" value="/jsp/"></property>
        <property name="suffix" value=".jsp"></property>
    </bean>
    <!--prefix:еүҚзјҖ-->
    <!--suffix:еҗҺзјҖ-->

и§ЈжһҗеҷЁдҪҝз”ЁжіЁж„Ҹпјҡ

public static final java.lang.String REDIRECT_URL_PREFIX = “redirect:”; public static final java.lang.String FORWARD_URL_PREFIX = “forward:”;

item.title: Java Email
item.description:
дёҖпјҡдҪҝз”Ё

1.еј•е…Ҙдҫқиө–

<!-- https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/javax.mail/mail -->
<dependency>
    <groupId>javax.mail</groupId>
    <artifactId>mail</artifactId>
    <version>1.4.7</version>
</dependency>

<!-- https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/javax.activation/activation -->
<dependency>
    <groupId>javax.activation</groupId>
    <artifactId>activation</artifactId>
    <version>1.1.1</version>
</dependency>

2.з®ҖеҚ•йӮ®д»¶

package com.xiaoyu;

import com.sun.mail.util.MailSSLSocketFactory;

import javax.mail.*;
import javax.mail.internet.InternetAddress;
import javax.mail.internet.MimeMessage;
import java.security.GeneralSecurityException;
import java.util.Properties;

public class ProSimpl {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws GeneralSecurityException, MessagingException {
        final Properties properties = new Properties();
        properties.setProperty("mail.host","smtp.qq.com");
        properties.setProperty("mail.transport.protocol","smtp");
        properties.setProperty("mail.smtp.auth","true");
//        qqйӮ®з®ұиҝҳйңҖиҰҒи®ҫзҪ®sslеҠ еҜҶпјҢqqзӢ¬жңүзҡ„е…¶д»–йӮ®з®ұжІЎжңү
        final MailSSLSocketFactory mailSSLSocketFactory = new MailSSLSocketFactory();
        mailSSLSocketFactory.setTrustAllHosts(true);
        properties.put("mail.smtp.ssl.enable","true");
        properties.put("mail.smtp.ssl.socketFactory",mailSSLSocketFactory);

//        1.еҲӣе»әе®ҡд№үж•ҙдёӘеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸжүҖйңҖзҡ„зҺҜеўғдҝЎжҒҜзҡ„sessionеҜ№иұЎ
//        qqзӢ¬жңүзҡ„е…¶д»–йӮ®з®ұжІЎжңү
        final Session session = Session.getDefaultInstance(properties, new Authenticator() {
            @Override
            protected PasswordAuthentication getPasswordAuthentication() {
//                еҸ‘д»¶дәәйӮ®з®ұз”ЁжҲ·еҗҚпјҢжҺҲжқғз Ғ/
                return new PasswordAuthentication("xxxx@qq.com", "xxxxx");
            }
        });
//        1.ејҖеҗҜdebugжЁЎејҸ
        session.setDebug(true);
//        2.йҖҡиҝҮsessionеҫ—еҲ°transportеҜ№иұЎ
        final Transport transport = session.getTransport();
//        3.дҪҝз”ЁйӮ®з®ұзҡ„з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚе’ҢжҺҲжқғз ҒиҝһжҺҘйӮ®з®ұжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ
        transport.connect("smtp.qq.com","xxxx@qq.com","xxxx");
//        4.еҲӣе»әйӮ®д»¶
        final MimeMessage message = new MimeMessage(session);
//        жҢҮжҳҺеҸ‘д»¶дәә
        message.setFrom(new InternetAddress("xxxx@qq.com"));
//        жҢҮжҳҺж”¶д»¶дәә
        message.setRecipients(Message.RecipientType.TO, String.valueOf(new InternetAddress("xxxx@qq.com")));
//        йӮ®д»¶ж Үйўҳ
        message.setSubject("hello");
//        йӮ®д»¶еҶ…е®№
        message.setContent("<h1 style='color:red'>hello world</h1>","text/html;charset=utf-8");
//        5.еҸ‘йҖҒйӮ®д»¶
        transport.sendMessage(message,message.getAllRecipients());

//        6.е…ій—ӯ
        transport.close();
    }
}

3.еӣҫзүҮйӮ®д»¶

package com.xiaoyu;

import com.sun.mail.util.MailSSLSocketFactory;

import javax.activation.DataHandler;
import javax.activation.FileDataSource;
import javax.mail.*;
import javax.mail.internet.InternetAddress;

import javax.mail.internet.MimeBodyPart;
import javax.mail.internet.MimeMessage;
import javax.mail.internet.MimeMultipart;
import java.security.GeneralSecurityException;
import java.util.Properties;

public class ProImage {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws GeneralSecurityException, MessagingException {
        final Properties properties = new Properties();
        properties.setProperty("mail.host","smtp.qq.com");
        properties.setProperty("mail.transport.protocol","smtp");
        properties.setProperty("mail.smtp.auth","true");
//        qqйӮ®з®ұиҝҳйңҖиҰҒи®ҫзҪ®sslеҠ еҜҶпјҢqqзӢ¬жңүзҡ„е…¶д»–йӮ®з®ұжІЎжңү
        final MailSSLSocketFactory mailSSLSocketFactory = new MailSSLSocketFactory();
        mailSSLSocketFactory.setTrustAllHosts(true);
        properties.put("mail.smtp.ssl.enable","true");
        properties.put("mail.smtp.ssl.socketFactory",mailSSLSocketFactory);

//        1.еҲӣе»әе®ҡд№үж•ҙдёӘеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸжүҖйңҖзҡ„зҺҜеўғдҝЎжҒҜзҡ„sessionеҜ№иұЎ
//        qqзӢ¬жңүзҡ„е…¶д»–йӮ®з®ұжІЎжңү
        final Session session = Session.getDefaultInstance(properties, new Authenticator() {
            @Override
            protected PasswordAuthentication getPasswordAuthentication() {
//                еҸ‘д»¶дәәйӮ®з®ұз”ЁжҲ·еҗҚпјҢжҺҲжқғз Ғ/
                return new PasswordAuthentication("xxx@qq.com", "xxxx");
            }
        });
//        1.ејҖеҗҜdebugжЁЎејҸ
        session.setDebug(true);
//        2.йҖҡиҝҮsessionеҫ—еҲ°transportеҜ№иұЎ
        final Transport transport = session.getTransport();
//        3.дҪҝз”ЁйӮ®з®ұзҡ„з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚе’ҢжҺҲжқғз ҒиҝһжҺҘйӮ®з®ұжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ
        transport.connect("smtp.qq.com","xxxx@qq.com","xxxx");
//        4.еҲӣе»әйӮ®д»¶
        final MimeMessage message = new MimeMessage(session);
//        жҢҮжҳҺеҸ‘д»¶дәә
        message.setFrom(new InternetAddress("xxxx@qq.com"));
//        жҢҮжҳҺж”¶д»¶дәә
        message.setRecipients(Message.RecipientType.TO, String.valueOf(new InternetAddress("xxxx@qq.com")));
//        йӮ®д»¶ж Үйўҳ
        message.setSubject("hello");
//        йӮ®д»¶еҶ…е®№
//        еӣҫзүҮ
        MimeBodyPart image = new MimeBodyPart();
        DataHandler dataHandler = new DataHandler(new FileDataSource("src/main/resources/zhizhuxia.jpg"));
        image.setDataHandler(dataHandler);
        image.setContentID("zhizhuxia.jpg");
//        ж–Үеӯ—
        MimeBodyPart text = new MimeBodyPart();
        text.setContent("еӣҫзүҮ<img src='cid:zhizhuxia.jpg'>","text/html;charset=utf-8");
//        жҸҸиҝ°ж•°жҚ®е…ізі»
        MimeMultipart mimeMultipart = new MimeMultipart();
        mimeMultipart.addBodyPart(image);
        mimeMultipart.addBodyPart(text);
        mimeMultipart.setSubType("related");
//        и®ҫзҪ®еҲ°ж¶ҲжҒҜдёӯпјҢдҝқеӯҳдҝ®ж”№
        message.setContent(mimeMultipart);
        message.saveChanges();
//        5.еҸ‘йҖҒйӮ®д»¶
        transport.sendMessage(message,message.getAllRecipients());

//        6.е…ій—ӯ
        transport.close();
    }
}

4.йҷ„д»¶йӮ®д»¶

package com.xiaoyu;

import com.sun.mail.util.MailSSLSocketFactory;

import javax.activation.DataHandler;
import javax.activation.FileDataSource;
import javax.mail.*;
import javax.mail.internet.*;
import java.security.GeneralSecurityException;
import java.util.Properties;

public class ProImageAndFile {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws GeneralSecurityException, MessagingException {
        final Properties properties = new Properties();
        properties.setProperty("mail.host","smtp.qq.com");
        properties.setProperty("mail.transport.protocol","smtp");
        properties.setProperty("mail.smtp.auth","true");
//        qqйӮ®з®ұиҝҳйңҖиҰҒи®ҫзҪ®sslеҠ еҜҶпјҢqqзӢ¬жңүзҡ„е…¶д»–йӮ®з®ұжІЎжңү
        final MailSSLSocketFactory mailSSLSocketFactory = new MailSSLSocketFactory();
        mailSSLSocketFactory.setTrustAllHosts(true);
        properties.put("mail.smtp.ssl.enable","true");
        properties.put("mail.smtp.ssl.socketFactory",mailSSLSocketFactory);

//        1.еҲӣе»әе®ҡд№үж•ҙдёӘеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸжүҖйңҖзҡ„зҺҜеўғдҝЎжҒҜзҡ„sessionеҜ№иұЎ
//        qqзӢ¬жңүзҡ„е…¶д»–йӮ®з®ұжІЎжңү
        final Session session = Session.getDefaultInstance(properties, new Authenticator() {
            @Override
            protected PasswordAuthentication getPasswordAuthentication() {
//                еҸ‘д»¶дәәйӮ®з®ұз”ЁжҲ·еҗҚпјҢжҺҲжқғз Ғ/
                return new PasswordAuthentication("xxxxx@qq.com", "xxxx");
            }
        });
//        1.ејҖеҗҜdebugжЁЎејҸ
        session.setDebug(true);
//        2.йҖҡиҝҮsessionеҫ—еҲ°transportеҜ№иұЎ
        final Transport transport = session.getTransport();
//        3.дҪҝз”ЁйӮ®з®ұзҡ„з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚе’ҢжҺҲжқғз ҒиҝһжҺҘйӮ®з®ұжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ
        transport.connect("smtp.qq.com","xxxx@qq.com","xxxxx");
//        4.йӮ®д»¶еҶ…е®№
        final MimeMessage message = message(session);
//        5.еҸ‘йҖҒйӮ®д»¶
        transport.sendMessage(message,message.getAllRecipients());

//        6.е…ій—ӯ
        transport.close();
    }
    public static MimeMessage message(Session session) throws MessagingException {
        final MimeMessage message = new MimeMessage(session);
        message.setFrom(new InternetAddress("xxxx@qq.com"));
        message.setRecipients(Message.RecipientType.TO,"xxxx@qq.com");
        message.setSubject("дё»йўҳ");
        //        еӣҫзүҮ
        MimeBodyPart image = new MimeBodyPart();
        DataHandler dataHandler = new DataHandler(new FileDataSource("src/main/resources/zhizhuxia.jpg"));
        image.setDataHandler(dataHandler);
        image.setContentID("zhizhuxia.jpg");
//        ж–Үеӯ—
        MimeBodyPart text = new MimeBodyPart();
        text.setContent("еӣҫзүҮ<img src='cid:zhizhuxia.jpg'>","text/html;charset=utf-8");
//        йҷ„д»¶
        MimeBodyPart file1 = new MimeBodyPart();
        file1.setDataHandler(new DataHandler(new FileDataSource("src/main/resources/a.text")));
        file1.setFileName("a.text");
        MimeBodyPart file2 = new MimeBodyPart();
        file2.setDataHandler(new DataHandler(new FileDataSource("src/main/resources/b.text")));
        file2.setFileName("b.text");
//        жҸҸиҝ°ж•°жҚ®е…ізі»
        MimeMultipart mimeMultipart = new MimeMultipart();
        mimeMultipart.addBodyPart(image);
        mimeMultipart.addBodyPart(text);
        mimeMultipart.setSubType("related");
//        жӢјиЈ…жӯЈж–Үдёәдё»дҪ“
        final MimeBodyPart mimeBodyPart = new MimeBodyPart();
        mimeBodyPart.setContent(mimeMultipart);
//        жӢјжҺҘйҷ„д»¶
        final MimeMultipart allfile = new MimeMultipart();
        allfile.addBodyPart(file1);
        allfile.addBodyPart(file2);
        allfile.addBodyPart(mimeBodyPart);
        allfile.setSubType("mixed");
//        ж”ҫеҲ°ж¶ҲжҒҜдёӯ
        message.setContent(allfile);
        message.saveChanges();
        return message;
    }
}
